Expression.name: 表达式 Expression
Expression.description:
野蛮人的狂暴是力量的表达，既体现在情绪上，也体现在其施展之中。野蛮人狂暴最简单的形式传达了其字面含义：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.Item.bIUXQGJ9KMcZcQBz]{暴烈且无法控制的愤怒}。然而，还有其他表达方式也能唤起同样标志性的力量感官，并且这些往往遵循与传统“狂暴”不同的诠释。

野蛮人只能选择一种表达方式，必须在他们第一次成为野蛮人（职业）成员时选定。该表达方式无法更改，并代表你的野蛮人如何表达他们的狂暴。除非另有说明，仍会适用那些会调整你的狂暴的本能能力。

表达方式会调整狂暴在遭遇中的表现方式，通常会为战斗带来一种新的应对方式，以及振奋的情绪状态。你狂暴时，不再获得等同于你的等级加上你的体质调整值的临时生命值，而是会在你的表达方式之振奋所描述的情形下，获得正常数量一半的临时生命值。当你拥有其赋予的临时生命值时，你获得振奋的效果。你每轮无法获得振奋加值超过一次。若你具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.qMtyQGUllPdgpzUo]{复苏狂暴}职业特性，则将临时生命值数量提高至等同于你从狂暴通常会获得的正常数量。

表达方式也会调整或替换你因身为野蛮人而获得的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.a9PzINjFTO5GvAJN]{急躁}自由动作（），并且可能将你的野蛮人在运动方面的训练替换为另一项适合你表达方式的技能。若你从你的表达方式获得一个在穿着重型护甲时受限的动作或行动，并且你具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.FGtiEx0yYHu16mN1]{无懈可击的狂暴者}职业专长，则你不再因穿着重型护甲而受限于使用你获得的该动作或行动（不过你仍可能受到其他需求的限制）。

A barbarian’s rage is an expression of power, both in its emotion and in its exertion. The simplest form of a barbarian’s rage conveys its literal meaning: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.Item.bIUXQGJ9KMcZcQBz]{violent and uncontrollable anger}. However, there are other expressions that can draw forth the same iconic senses of power, and these often subscribe to a different interpretation than a traditional “Rage”.

A barbarian may only have one expression selected which must be chosen when they first become a member of the barbarian class. This expression cannot be changed and represents the way in which your barbarian expresses their rage. Unless otherwise stated, instinct abilities that modify your rage still apply.

An expression modifies how rage is exhibited in an encounter, usually to giving it a new approach to combat and the emotional state of invigoration. Instead of gaining temporary Hit Points equal to your level plus your Constitution modifier when you Rage, half the normal amount of temporary Hit Points are gained under the circumstances detailed in your expression’s invigoration. You gain the effects of your invigoration while you have the temporary Hit Points it grants. You cannot gain an invigoration bonus more than once per round. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.Item.qMtyQGUllPdgpzUo]{Revitalizing Rage} class feature, increase the number of temporary Hit Points to be equal to the normal amount you would gain from Rage.

An expression also alters or replaces the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.a9PzINjFTO5GvAJN]{Quick Tempered} free action you gain from being a barbarian and may replace your barbarian training in Athletics with another skill appropriate for your expression. If you gain an action or activity from your expression that is restricted while wearing heavy armor and you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.FGtiEx0yYHu16mN1]{Invulnerable Rager} class feat, you are no longer restricted from using the action or activity you gained due to wearing heavy armor (though you might still be restricted by other requirements).

Decay Instinct (Alternate).name: 腐朽本能（替代） Decay Instinct (Alternate)
Decay Instinct (Alternate).description:
肉体的腐烂可以呈现许多形式，无论是因死亡，还是因与环境的自然融合。有些人推测，真菌本身是由生命能量在进入下一个世界时被消耗而衍生出的有机体；当生命能量继续在生命循环中由有机走向无机的过程中前行时，真菌会将有机物质释放出来。

本能能力—腐烂狂怒 当你进入狂怒时，你可以选择将狂怒所提供的额外伤害从2提高到3，或将其从2提高到6并将其伤害类型改为毒素，而不是你武器或徒手攻击的伤害类型。如果你选择造成毒素伤害，你的狂怒动作获得原初与毒素（特征），并且在你的每个回合结束时，由于你的血肉腐朽，你会受到1点伤害。此伤害无法以任何方式被减少或避免。你只能在狂怒开始时作出此选择，且其效果会持续到你的狂怒结束。

专精能力（7级） 当你进入狂怒时，将狂怒所提供的额外伤害从3提高到7；或者若你选择将其伤害类型改为毒素，则从6提高到10，但你在回合结束时所受的伤害增加到5点。若你拥有高等武器专精，则改为将狂怒的伤害从7提高到13；或者若你选择将其伤害类型改为毒素，则从10提高到18，但你所受的伤害增加到10点。

狂怒抗力（9级） 你对毒素伤害具有抗力；此外，无论伤害类型为何，你也对具有真菌（特征）的生物之攻击与能力所造成的伤害具有抗力。

额外专长： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.0lieFKdwgNVXep7u]{毒素抗力}（2级）

The rotting of flesh can take many forms, whether by death or by natural integration with the environment. Some theorize that fungus itself are organisms derived from the consumption of life energy as it passes into the next world, relinquishing organic matter to continue its passing through the cycle of life to inorganic.

Instinct Ability—Rotting Rage When you rage, you can choose to increase the additional damage from Rage from 2 to 3, or from 2 to 6 and change its damage type to poison, instead of the damage type for your weapon or unarmed attack. If you choose to deal poison damage, your Rage action gains the primal and poison traits, and you take 1 damage at the end of each of your turns as your flesh decays. This damage can’t be reduced or avoided by any means. You may make this choice only when your rage begins, and it remains in effect until your rage ends.

Specialization Ability (7th) When you rage, increase the additional damage from Rage from 3 to 7, or from 6 to 10 if you choose to change its damage type to poison, but the damage you take at the end of your turn increases to 5. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the damage from Rage from 7 to 13, or from 10 to 18 if you choose to change its damage type to poison, but the damage you take increases to 10.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist poison damage, as well as damage dealt by the attacks and abilities of creatures with the fungus trait, regardless of the damage type.

Additional Feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.0lieFKdwgNVXep7u]{Poison Resistance} (2nd)

Spell Eating.name: 法术吞噬 Spell Eating
Spell Eating.description:
你将痛楚吞下，任由流经你体内的魔法缝合你破碎的身体。你可以消耗一个你从该变体获得的法术位，并为所消耗的法术位每一环阶恢复 @Damage[1d12[healing]] 生命值。就触发你来自狂暴的额外伤害而言，这算作施放一个法术。

You swallow the pain by allowing the magic that flows through you to stitch your broken body. You can consume a spell slot you gained from this archetype and restore @Damage[1d12[healing]] Hit Points for each rank of the spell slot consumed. This counts as casting a spell for the purposes of triggering your additional damage from Rage.

Ravage the Land.name: 蹂躏大地 Ravage the Land
Ravage the Land.description:
触发 你将会受到来自腐朽狂怒的伤害。

你的腐朽在你身边滋长，在你周围变得更加暴烈且具破坏性。你汲取大地本身，在一个@Template[distance:30|type:emanation]中制造腐朽，并且你不会受到你通常会受到的触发伤害。该区域在1周内无法维持植物生命。如果你处于自然地形中，该效果的频率降低为每轮一次，且区域内的植物生命会枯萎并死亡。若在该放射中的某个生物具有植物（特征），则其会承受触发伤害，并以你的职业DC为对抗进行一次@Check[basic:true|type:fortitude|against:classDC]。

Trigger You would take damage from rotting rage.

Your decay grows in your presence, becoming more violent and destructive in your presence. You sap the land itself creating decay in a @Template[distance:30|type:emanation] and you do not take the triggering damage you normally would. The area becomes unable to sustain plant life for 1 week. If you were in natural terrain, the frequency of this effect is reduced to once per round and plant life within the area withers and dies. If a creature in the emanation has the plant trait, they take the triggering damage with a @Check[basic:true|type:fortitude|against:classDC] against your class DC.

Summon the Pack.name: 召唤兽群 Summon the Pack
Summon the Pack.description:
你在你同伴同类生物之中的声望已增长至传奇。无论你走到哪里，动物都会在远处跟随，随时准备听从他们的双重领主召唤投入战斗。当你召唤兽群时，它们会迸发而出，援助你的同伴。你的同伴获得部队特征及其相关能力，其HP阈值等于其总HP的⅔与⅓，并获得以下能力：

  • 15点临时生命值。

  • 对区域伤害具有弱点，数值等于你等级的一半。

  • 当你花费两个动作来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.q9nbyIF0PEBqMtYe]{命令动物} 时，获得3个动作的能力。

  • 它获得兽群攻击 1 至 3，且在持续时间内不能进行徒手攻击。你的动物伙伴的兽群攻击在一个 @Template[distance:5|type:emanation] 内，每花费1个动作造成1d12伤害加上其力量调整值，并允许以 @Check[basic:true|type:reflex |against:classDC] 进行豁免。其兽群攻击的伤害类型与其某个徒手攻击的伤害类型相同。

Your reputation among creatures of your partner's kind has grown to be legendary. Wherever you go, animals follow from afar, ready to be called to battle by their dual lords. When you Summon The Pack, they burst forth, aiding your partner. Your companion gains the Troop trait and its associated abilities with HP thresholds equal to ⅔ and ⅓ of its total HP and the following abilities:

  • 15 temporary hit points.

  • Weakness equal to half your level to area damage.

  • The ability to gain 3 actions when you spend two actions to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.q9nbyIF0PEBqMtYe]{Command an Animal}.

  • It gains Pack Attack 1 to 3 and cannot make unarmed attacks for the duration. Your animal companion’s Pack Attack deals 1d12 damage plus its Strength modifier for each action spent in a @Template[distance:5|type:emanation] with a @Check[basic:true|type:reflex |against:classDC] save. The damage of its Pack Attack is of the same type as one of your animal companion’s unarmed attacks.

Fullsword.name: 阔剑 Fullsword
Fullsword.description:
这把巨大的剑长约六英尺，而且异常宽阔。由于刀刃冲击的巨大重量，惯性常常让这块铁板在长距离挥击中划出弧形的回旋，使其通过碾压造成的伤害几乎与劈砍造成的伤害一样多。

This enormous sword is about six feet long, and exceptionally wide. Momentum often carries this slab of iron with long blows in arcing swirls, doing as much damage through crushing as slashing due to the sheer weight of the blade's impact.

Warding Bauble.name: 守护饰物 Warding Bauble
Warding Bauble.description:
你随身携带一个护身的小饰物或小玩意，它象征着你对魔法的憎恨，并保护你免受那些意图阻挠你的施法者侵害。当你针对怨灵或法术进行豁免骰时，若+2环境加值可以将一次大失败变为失败、失败变为成功，或成功变为大成功，你可以追溯性地给予自己此次检定+2环境加值，并相应改变结果。一旦你使用此效果，你的饰物会变得失效，直到你下一次每日准备。

You carry with you a protective trinket or bauble that exemplifies your hatred of magic and protects you from the wielders that would wish to thwart you. When you make a saving throw against a haunt or spell and a +2 circumstance bonus would turn a critical failure into a failure, a failure into a success, or a success into a critical success, you can grant yourself a +2 circumstance bonus to the check retroactively, changing the outcome appropriately. Once you use this effect, your bauble becomes inert until your next daily preparations.

Animal Instinct+.name: 兽性本能+ Animal Instinct+
Animal Instinct+.description:
当你狂暴时，狂野掠食者的怒火充盈于你体内，赋予你凶猛的徒手攻击。崇敬凶残动物（如猿或熊）的文化会孕育出拥有此本能的野蛮人。你也可能正与自身性格中不可控的兽性一面作战，或你可能是狼人或其他兽化生物的后裔。从“动物本能”表中选择一种最符合你所选动物的动物。

本能能力——野兽狂暴 当你处于狂暴时，你获得所选动物的徒手攻击（或多种攻击），但你无法使用武器。你获得的具体攻击、其造成的伤害以及其特征列于“动物本能”表中。这些攻击属于格斗组。你的狂暴动作获得变形与原能（特征）。

专精能力（7级） 将你所选动物所赋予的徒手攻击的伤害骰尺寸提高一级，并将狂暴对这些徒手攻击所提供的额外伤害从2提高至5。若你拥有强效武器专精，则将狂暴对这些徒手攻击所提供的伤害从5提高至12。

狂暴抗力（9级） 你抵抗穿刺与挥砍伤害。

The fury of a wild predator fills you when you Rage, granting you ferocious unarmed attacks. Cultures that revere vicious animals (such as apes or bears) give rise to barbarians with this instinct. You might also be at war with an uncontrollable, animalistic side of your personality, or you might be a descendant of a werewolf or another werecreature. Select an animal from the Animal Instincts table that best matches your chosen animal.

Instinct Ability—Bestial Rage While raging, you gain your chosen animal's unarmed attack (or attacks), but you're unable to use weapons. The specific attack gained, the damage it deals, and its traits are listed in the Animal Instincts table. These attacks are in the brawling group. Your Rage action gains the morph and primal traits.

Specialization Ability (7th) Increase the damage die size for the unarmed attacks granted by your chosen animal by one step, and increase the additional damage from Rage from 2 to 5 for your chosen animal's unarmed attacks. If you have greater weapon specialization, increase the damage from Rage from 5 to 12 for your chosen animal's unarmed attacks.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist piercing and slashing damage.

HIT ME!.name: 打我！ HIT ME!
HIT ME!.description:
触发 你能对其进行威吓的30英尺内一名敌人试图对一名盟友进行攻击。

你向该生物宣告你将把它碾碎，将注意力从你的盟友身上移开并转向你。你对触发的生物[[/act demoralize]]。若你的威吓成功，则其惊惧（状态）在其回合结束时不能降低到1以下，直到它对你使用一次敌对动作，或它至少连续1轮无法观察或感知到你为止。

Trigger An enemy within 30 feet you could Demoralize attempts an attack on an ally.

You announce to the creature that you are going to pulverize them, taking the attention off of your allies and towards you. You [[/act demoralize]] the triggering creature. If your Demoralize is successful, its frightened condition can’t decrease to less than 1 at the end of its turn until it either uses a hostile action against you or can no longer observe or sense you for at least 1 round.

Doubleblade.name: 双刃剑 Doubleblade
Doubleblade.description:
这根短杖的两端各装有一把剑。双刃剑常常像指挥棒一样旋转，形成一道刀刃螺旋，踏入其空间绝非明智之举。就双生特征而言，刃的每一端都视为一把独立的武器。

This short staff ends with two swords attached to either end. The doubleblade is often twirled like a baton, creating a spiral of blades that it would be unwise to enter the space of. For the purposes of the twin trait, each end of the blade counts as a separate weapon.

Gnarled Body.name: 虬结之躯 Gnarled Body
Gnarled Body.description:
你的伤口不会结痂——它们会扭结，让木质从你体内生长并打结成木质纤维。你获得中型与重型护甲的护甲专精效果，但你不使用通常的专精效果，而是始终使用木材组的效果。

Your injuries do not scab—they gnarl, allowing wood to grow from inside you and knot into wooden fibers. You gain the armor specialization effects of medium and heavy armor, but instead of the usual specialization effect, you always use the wood group’s effect.

Just Break It.name: 就把它打碎 Just Break It
Just Break It.description:
你已经学会将改进与机关调整到适合你粗糙的接触。你可以用运动代替盗贼来[[/act disable-device statistic=athletics]]或[[/act pick-a-lock statistic=athletics]]。如果你成功，目标物体或装置通常会在你达成预期结果之后获得破损（状态）（需经GM批准）。

You have learned to tailor advancements and mechanisms to your rough touch. You can use Athletics instead of Thievery to [[/act disable-device statistic=athletics]] or to [[/act pick-a-lock statistic=athletics]]. If you succeed, the target object or device usually gains the broken condition but after you have achieved the desired result (subject to GM approval).

Unfettered Rage.name: 无拘狂怒 Unfettered Rage
Unfettered Rage.description:
你无须躲藏亦无须钢铁，因为不受束缚的身体同样能够迸发强大的活力。当你狂暴时，你可以令肌肉隆起、皮肤硬化，使你获得对AC的+3物品加值，敏捷上限为+2。若你正穿着护甲，该护甲获得破损（状态）并从你身上脱落，掉入相邻的空间。

无甲时对AC的物品加值可与侦察者衣物上的护甲强效符文、秘法护甲法术或力场臂环提供的加值累加。

特殊 若你拥有“无懈狂战士”职业专长，你将对AC的物品加值提高至+4。

You need not hide nor steel, for the unrestricted body is capable of great vigor. When you Rage, you can cause your muscles to bulge and skin to harden, granting you a +3 item bonus to AC with a Dexterity cap of +2. If you are wearing armor, it gains the broken condition and falls off your body into an adjacent space.

The item bonus to AC while unarmored is cumulative with armor potency runes on your explorer's clothing, the mystic armor spell, or bands of force.

Special If you have the Invulnerable Rager class feat, you increase the item bonus to AC to +4.

Advanced Harness Bloodline.name: 进阶驭血血脉 Advanced Harness Bloodline
Advanced Harness Bloodline.description:
你与你的血脉进一步融合。你获得你血脉的进阶血脉法术。

You merge even further with your bloodline. You gain your bloodline’s advanced bloodline spell.

Palintonos Bow.name: 帕林托诺斯弓 Palintonos Bow
Palintonos Bow.description:
这把强力弓将为拉弦所需的能量储存在其延展的弓臂中。与普通弓不同，尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{修理}或重新装弦帕林托诺斯弓时，使用者还必须额外进行一次运动或制造检定，并以其制造DC为目标DC，成功后才能完成。生物在进行这些检定，以及对该物品进行修理的检定时，都会承受来自反冲特征的环境减值，除非它们也满足反冲特征中用于避免该环境减值的力量需求。

特殊 你可以将大口径改装件安装在帕林托诺斯弓上，即使它不是火器。

This powerful bow stores energy needed to string it in its extended limbs. Unlike a normal bow, attempting to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{Repair} or restring a palintonos bow requires the user to succeed at an additional Athletics or Crafting check against its Crafting DC to do so. Creatures take the circumstance penalty from the kickback trait to these checks and to checks to Repair the item unless they also meet the Strength requirements to avoid the circumstance penalty of the kickback trait.

Special You can attach large bore modifications to a palintonos bow even though it is not a firearm.

Steps of Disaster.name: 灾害的步骤 Steps of Disaster
Steps of Disaster.description:
你的步伐欢迎灾害。你为此行动所花费的每个行动都进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{Step}，制造持续4轮的有害地形。每当一个生物移动进入这些方格之一时，它会受到 @Damage[(max(1,@actor.flags.pf2e.disasterInstinct.damage))[@actor.flags.pf2e.disasterInstinct.trait]] 伤害。伤害数值与类型与你狂暴时的散发效果相同。你无视你自己的有害地形。

1 你在进行Step之前所在的空间创造有害地形。

2 你在两次Step之前所在的空间创造有害地形，并在与你最后一次Step相同的方向上创造一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:10]。

3 你在每次Step之前所在的空间创造有害地形，并在与你最后一次Step相同的方向上创造一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]。

特殊 如果你拥有“灾厄盟友”，你所选择的盟友也会无视你的有害地形。

FoundryVTT 注记 你可以使用 @Template[type:line|distance:5]{5-foot lines} 来标示由你的Step造成的有害地形。

Your steps welcome disaster. You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{Step} for each action spent for this activity, creating hazardous terrain that lasts for 4 rounds. A creature takes @Damage[(max(1,@actor.flags.pf2e.disasterInstinct.damage))[@actor.flags.pf2e.disasterInstinct.trait]] damage each time it moves into one of these squares. The damage amount and type are the same as your emanation from rage. You ignore your own hazardous terrain.

1 You create hazardous terrain in the space you were in before your Step.

2 You create hazardous terrain in the spaces you were in before both of your Steps and in a @Template[type:cone|distance:10] in the same direction as your last Step.

3 You create hazardous terrain in the spaces you were in before your Steps and in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] in the same direction as your last Step.

Special If you have Allies of the Calamity, your selected allies ignore your hazardous terrain as well.

FoundryVTT Note You can use @Template[type:line|distance:5]{5-foot lines} to denote the hazardous terrain from your Steps.

Percussive Maintenance.name: 敲击式维护 Percussive Maintenance
Percussive Maintenance.description:
你知道如何用老派的暴力手段从构造装置中取得成果。对一个物体或具有构装体（特征）的生物进行一次近战攻击。选择“修复”或“拆解”之一，之后该目标在1天内免疫你的震击维护。

修复 进行一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{修理}的检定，使用你的攻击掷骰作为你的制作检定，对抗该物体或生物的制作DC或AC（取较高者）。

拆解 如常以你的攻击掷骰对抗目标的AC。若你命中，你如常以你的徒手攻击造成伤害，且目标的AC承受–1状态减值，并将其硬度降低你等级的一半，直到你下个回合结束。

You know how to get results from constructed devices with good old fashioned violence. Make a melee Strike against an object or creature with the construct trait. Choose between Fix or Dismantle, after which the target is immune to your Percussive Maintenance for 1 day.

Fix Make a check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{Repair} the object or creature using your attack roll as your Craft check against the targets Craft DC or AC, whichever is higher.

Dismantle Make your attack roll against the target’s AC as normal. If you hit, you deal damage as normal for your unarmed Strike and the target takes a –1 status penalty to AC and reduces its Hardness by half your level until the end of your next turn.

Faith Will Vindicate Me!.name: 信仰将为我昭雪！ Faith Will Vindicate Me!
Faith Will Vindicate Me!.description:
需求 你将一个对你的神祇而言属禁忌的生物的生命值降至0。

只要你以你的神祇之名行事，你的动作就会胜过你的罪孽。你的目标——不，你的职责——就是杀死那些胆敢阻挡你全能神祇神圣计划之路的家伙，而你就是他们的武器！

你恢复1点聚能点。

Requirements You reduce a creature anathema to your deity to 0 Hit Points.

Your actions outweigh your sins, so long as you commit them in your deity's name. It is your goal—nay, your duty—to slay those who dare stand in the way of the divine plan of your all-powerful deity, and YOU are their weapon!

You regain a Focus Point.

Gory Finish.name: 血腥终结 Gory Finish
Gory Finish.description:
触发 你以一次重击将一个有实体的敌人降至0生命值。

你以真正令人难以置信的方式了结对手，使其他人作呕并连连后退。30尺内的所有敌人必须针对你的职业DC进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classDC.value)] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3}。

Trigger You reduce a corporeal enemy to 0 Hit Points with a critical hit.

You finish off an opponent in a truly incredible way, causing others to retch and recoil. All enemies within 30 feet must make a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classDC.value)] save against your class DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3}.

Runic Instinct.name: 符文本能 Runic Instinct
Runic Instinct.description:
通过风格化的墨纹刺青、精心涂抹的战纹，或直接在皮肤上刻下疤痕，你把故事穿在自己的皮上，让其增强你的力量。无论这是一项你族裔的古老根源，还是个人反叛之举，你的符文都让你令人瞩目，并赐予你不可思议的力量。

本能能力——符文印记当你狂暴（特征）时，你的符文如同活物般旋转与变换。你在狂暴（特征）时的狂暴（特征）与打击获得魔法（特征），并且你从狂暴（特征）获得的额外伤害从2提升至3。你的身体覆盖着奇异的标记，你在狂暴（特征）时通过它们宣泄强烈情绪。从下列列表中选择一种符文类型，你获得所列效果。

  • 解剖 你的符文精确描绘出你的内里——骨骼、神经与器官。当你在狂暴（特征）时恢复生命值，你额外恢复等同于你等级一半加上你的体质调整值的生命值。每个效果你只能获得一次额外生命值，即使你会从同一个效果多次恢复生命值。你在狂暴（特征）时的抗力伤害为虚无伤害；若你具有虚无治疗，则改为活力伤害。

  • 氏族纹章 你家园与族人的纹样让你继续战斗——可能是前臂上的矮人符号，也可能是背上的家徽。你获得一个额外的1环族裔专长。你在狂暴（特征）时的抗力为心灵伤害。

  • 绚彩 你的符文随心跳节奏近乎催眠般变换色彩。当你以打击对一名生物造成大成功或大失败时，该生物陷入迷魂（状态），直到其下个回合结束。即使你或你的盟友对该生物或其盟友采取敌对动作，该迷魂（状态）也不会结束。你在狂暴（特征）时的抗力伤害为心灵伤害。

  • 兽纹 你以对你重要的动物为主题装饰自身标记，可能是你狩猎的生物如原牛或猛犸，也可能是你敬仰的猛兽如虎或狼。你获得“动物共情”专长。你在狂暴（特征）时的抗力适用于来自动物或野兽的物理伤害。

  • 传奇 你的皮肤被古代英雄的凯旋故事所标记，例如兽人英雄贝尔克岑，或尼达尔的马语者阿泰。你获得“传奇学识（技能）”技能，这是一种特殊的学识（技能），由于传奇中广博的知识，你可以用它对任何主题进行回忆知识。你在狂暴（特征）时，使用传奇学识（技能）的回忆知识检定具有狂暴（特征）。当你获得高等武器专精时，你在传奇学识（技能）上的熟练度提升至专家，但你不能以任何其他方式提升传奇学识（技能）的熟练度等级。你在狂暴（特征）时的抗力由你选择：穿刺、挥砍或钝击。

  • 金属 你的符文泛着金属光泽的微光，暗示着隐藏的力量。当你开始狂暴（特征）时，你可以将你身上一件物品变为由低等冷铁或银制成，持续至你的狂暴（特征）结束。10级时，你可以将其变为常见品质的精金、冷铁、晨银或银。20级时，你可以选择任意物品品质的任意材料。该物品的性质对任何看到它的人都十分明显，因此无法被出售。你同一时间只能转化一件物品；更换物品会使原物品恢复其真实形态。你在狂暴（特征）时的抗力由你选择：穿刺、挥砍或钝击。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.iBjaGURxDymnnTuq]{Effect: Runic Metal}

  • 神秘 盯着你的符文太久会让人迷失其中。当你在狂暴（特征）时以打击造成大成功或大失败，你可以选择让自己被幻术遮掩而处于隐蔽，直到你进行一次攻击或你停止狂暴（特征），以先发生者为准。任何使用“搜寻”动作检查你的生物，都可以尝试以你的职业DC作为察觉DC来识破你的幻术。当某个生物识破该幻术后，你对该生物不再隐蔽，且该生物对该效果获得24小时的暂时免疫。你在狂暴（特征）时的抗力伤害为心灵伤害。

  • 自然 你的符文从自然世界汲取灵感，模仿火山、瀑布或强大的生物。在你的每日准备期间，选择酸蚀、寒冷、电击或火焰。你的狂暴（特征）伤害变为所选类型，且你的重击造成所选类型的1点额外伤害。若你拥有武器专精，则你改为造成所选类型的1d4点额外伤害；若你拥有高等武器专精，则为2d4点额外伤害。你在狂暴（特征）时的抗力伤害为你符文所选的伤害类型。

  • 守护 当你被可怕的重击命中时，你的符文会迅速窜向受击点。作为一个反应动作（），你可以在狂暴（特征）时对抗一次以你为目标的单次打击，使自己的AC获得+2环境加值。你必须在知晓该打击结果之前宣告你正在使用你的反应动作（）。你在狂暴（特征）时的抗力伤害为力场伤害。

  • 胜利 你曾完成的伟业被铭刻在你的身体上。当你对一名生物造成重击时，你获得临时生命值1，等同于你的等级加上你的力量调整值，持续1轮。你在狂暴（特征）时的抗力伤害为精准伤害。

  • 战争 你的符文扭曲并变化成武器，你可以让它们凭空出现在手中。选择一件你所熟练的简易、军用或高级武器。你可以用“交互”将所选武器存入并取回至你的一处刺青中。你可以用“交互”从刺青中抽出该武器，然后以一个单动作进行一次用其进行的打击。你在狂暴（特征）时的抗力伤害为武器造成的物理伤害。

专精能力（7级）将狂暴（特征）的额外伤害从3提升至7。若你拥有高等武器专精，则改为将狂暴（特征）的额外伤害提升至13。你每日可再投入2件魔法物品；若你为15级，则每日可再投入4件，但这些物品必须是魔法刺青。

狂暴抗力（9级）你抵抗流血伤害，以及由你的符文决定的一种伤害类型。

Through stylized inked tattoos, carefully applied war paint or scarification into your very skin, you wear stories on your hide that bolster your might. Whether an ancient tradition of your people or an act of individual rebellion, your runes make you a sight to behold and grant you incredible power.

Instinct Ability—Runic Marks As you rage, your runes swirl and shift as if they were alive. Your Rage and Strikes while raging gain the magical trait and you increase the additional damage from Rage from 2 to 3. Your body is covered in strange markings which you channel intense emotions through when you Rage. Choose a rune type from the list below and you gain the listed effect.

  • Anatomical Your runes accurately paint out your insides—your bones, your nerves, your organs. When you regain Hit Points while raging, you regain additional Hit Points equal to half your level plus your Constitution modifier. You can only gain additional Hit Points once per effect, even if you would regain Hit Points multiple times from the same effect. Your raging resistance damage is void damage, or vitality damage if you have void healing.

  • Clan Art of home and your people keeps you fighting, be it dwarven symbology on your forearms, or your family crest on your back. You gain an additional 1st-rank ancestry feat. Your raging resistance is mental damage.

  • Colorful Your runes shift colors almost hypnotically to the beat of your heart. When you critically succeed on a Strike against a creature, they become fascinated by you until the end of their next turn. This fascinated condition does not end if you or your allies take hostile actions against the creature or its allies. Your raging resistance damage is mental damage.

  • Fauna You decorate yourself with markings of animals important to you, be they hunted creatures like aurochs or mammoths, or revered beasts like tigers or wolves. You gain the Animal Empathy feat. Your raging resistance is against physical damage from animals or beasts.

  • Legends Your skin is marked by triumphant tales of ancient heroes, such as the orc hero Belkzen or Attai Horse-Speaker of Nidal. You gain the Legend Lore skill, a special Lore skill that can be used to Recall Knowledge on any topic thanks to the berth of knowledge known in legends. While raging, your Recall Knowledge checks that use your Legend Lore have the rage trait. When you gain greater weapon specialization, your proficiency in Legend Lore increases to expert, but you can’t increase your proficiency rank in Legend Lore by any other means. Your raging resistance is your choice of piercing, slashing, or bludgeoning.

  • Metals Your runes glint with traces of metallic sheen, hinting at hidden power. When you start raging, you can change an item on your person to be made of low grade cold iron or silver for the duration of your rage. At 10th level, you can change it to be common grade adamantine, cold iron, dawnsilver, or silver. At 20th level, you can select any material of any item quality. The nature of the item is obvious to any who sees it, and thus cannot be sold. You can only have one item transmuted at a time; changing the item reverts the original to its true form. Your raging resistance is your choice of piercing, slashing, or bludgeoning. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.iBjaGURxDymnnTuq]{Effect: Runic Metal}

  • Mysterious Looking at your runes too long can make you lose yourself within them. When you critically succeed at a Strike while raging you can choose to become concealed by an illusion until you make an attack or you stop raging, whichever comes first. Any creature that uses the Seek action to examine you can attempt to disbelieve your illusion using your class DC as the Perception DC. When a creature disbelieves the illusion, you are no longer concealed to that creature and it becomes temporarily immune to this effect for 24 hours. Your raging resistance damage is mental damage.

  • Nature Your runes take inspiration from the natural world, mimicking volcanos, waterfalls or mighty creatures. During your daily preparations, choose acid, cold, electricity, or fire. Your Rage damage becomes the chosen type and your critical hits deal 1 additional damage of the chosen type. If you have weapon specialization, you instead deal an additional 1d4 damage of the chosen type, or 2d4 additional damage if you have greater weapon specialization. Your raging resistance damage is your rune’s selected damage.

  • Protection Your runes dart to the point of impact when you are struck by terrible blows. As a reaction, you can give yourself a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against a single Strike that targets you while raging. You must declare you are using your reaction before you know the result of the Strike. Your raging resistance damage is force damage.

  • Victory Great deeds you have committed are immortalized on your body. When you critically strike a creature, you gain temporary Hit Points 1equal to your level plus your Strength modifier for round. Your raging resistance damage is precision damage.

  • War Your runes warp and change into weapons, which you can have appear in your hands from nowhere. Choose a simple, martial, or advanced weapon you are proficient in. You can Interact to store and retrieve the chosen weapon in one of your tattoos. You can Interact to draw this weapon from your tattoo, and then Strike with it as a single action. Your raging resistance damage is physical damage dealt by weapons.

Specialization Ability (7th) Increase the additional damage from Rage from 3 to 7. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the additional damage from Rage to 13. You may invest 2 more magic items per day or 4 more per day if you are at 15th level, but those items must be magic tattoos.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist bleed damage and one damage type determined by your runes.

Wrecker Instinct.name: 破坏者本能 Wrecker Instinct
Wrecker Instinct.description:
叮当作响的钢铁、嗡鸣的构装体（特征）以及工艺造物的产物会让你的血液沸腾。也许你的家园曾被可怕的机器撕碎。也许你害怕世上的劳动者会被为富人服务的金属怪物夺走生计。你也可能只是喜欢砸东西。无论如何，在你的狂怒将恶毒的科技重新打回其应有的无生命状态之前，你都不会休息。

本能能力—对抗机器的狂怒 你力求摧毁摆在你面前那些不自然且压迫性的造物。当你狂暴时，金属会在你的接触下崩裂折断，科技也会走火并卡顿。将你的狂暴额外伤害从2提升至3；若目标是具有构装体（特征）的生物，或你在过去1小时内曾目睹其使用配方簿、炸弹、弩或火器，则提升至4。你在使用强行开启（例如对锁具、机械危害或攻城武器）时，也会将狂暴的额外伤害应用于具有发条特征或结构复杂的物体。

专精能力（第7级） 将狂暴额外伤害从3提升至7；若目标是具有构装体（特征）的生物，或你在过去1小时内曾目睹其使用配方簿、炸弹、弩或火器，则提升至8。若你拥有高等狂暴专精，则改为将狂暴额外伤害提升至13；若目标是具有构装体（特征）的生物，或你在过去1小时内曾目睹其使用配方簿、炸弹、弩或火器，则提升至16。

狂暴抗力（第9级） 你获得对炸弹、弩、火器造成的伤害的抗力，并对具有构装体（特征）或发条特征的生物或危害对你造成的伤害获得抗力。

The sight of clanking steel, whirring constructs and the products of artifice makes your blood boil. Perhaps your home was torn apart by terrible machines. Maybe you fear that laborers of the world will have their livelihoods taken away by metal monstrosities that serve the rich. You might simply like breaking stuff. In whatever case, you will not rest until your rage has returned malicious technology to its rightful state of inanimacy.

Instinct Ability—Rage Against The Machine You seek to destroy the unnatural and oppressive constructions set before you. When you rage, metal snaps and breaks at your touch, and technology misfires and stutters. Increase your damage from Rage from 2 to 3, or 4 against creatures with the construct trait or that you have witnessed using a formula book, bombs, crossbows, or firearms within the last hour. You also apply your additional damage from Rage against objects with the clockwork trait or that are of complex construction when you use Force Open (such as locks, mechanical hazards or siege weapons).

Specialization Ability (7th) Increase the damage from Rage from 3 to 7, or 8 against creatures with the construct trait or that you have witnessed using a formula book, bombs, crossbows, or firearms within the last hour. If you have greater raging specialization, instead increase the damage from Rage to 13, or 16 against creatures with the construct trait or that you have witnessed using a formula book, bombs, crossbows, or firearms within the last hour.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist damage dealt to you by bombs, crossbows, firearms, and by creatures or hazards with the construct or clockwork traits.

Caustic Belch.name: 酸蚀喷吐 Caustic Belch
Caustic Belch.description:
你的身体在战斗的热度中翻腾出可怕的气体，你可以通过吐息攻击或打嗝将其猛烈释放。所有位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内的生物都处于你的腐蚀性嗝气之中并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，且所有在该区域外的生物对处于该区域内的生物而言为隐蔽。除你以外、位于该区域内的生物会受到@Damage[floor(@actor.level / 2)d8[poison]]{你每2等级拥有1d8点伤害}的伤害，并以你的职业DC为目标进行一次@Check[type:fortitude|basic:true|against:classDC]。你的腐蚀性嗝气持续1分钟，或直到被强风吹散。

特殊 若你拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.yR7PT5YV0Me18bPC]{易爆狂怒}且你曾消耗一枚炸弹，则你的腐蚀性嗝气造成的伤害类型与狂怒所提供的额外伤害类型相同。

Your body churns up terrible gasses in the heat of battle, and you can release them violently through a breath attack or belch. All creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] are inside your caustic belch and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all creatures outside the area are concealed to creatures within it. Creatures other than you inside the area take @Damage[floor(@actor.level / 2)d8[poison]]{1d8 damage per two levels} you possess with a @Check[type:fortitude|basic:true|against:classDC] against your class DC. Your caustic belch lasts 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong wind.

Special If you have @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.yR7PT5YV0Me18bPC]{Volatile Rage} and you consumed a bomb, your caustic belch deals the same type of damage as your additional damage from Rage.

Untamed Instinct.name: 不羁本能 Untamed Instinct
Untamed Instinct.description:
你发现自己的力量不仅与体内的狂暴（特征）相连，也与伙伴——一头强大的野兽——体内的狂暴（特征）相连。无论你是被野生动物养大、是杀死你们两个氏族的怪物的最后幸存者，还是与你长期决斗的一只可怕生物达成了不安的停战，你都与一只凶蛮的生物建立了不可思议的羁绊。你们共同渴望消灭敌人、保持不受克制负担的自由，这将你与伙伴们以狂怒的联合紧紧相系。

额外专长： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.tpkJXDpSuGznfzGJ]{成熟动物伙伴}（4级），@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.U52NMdeSNbjSSRHE]{不可思议的伙伴}（8级），@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Fai5VMyrtOrYC5JL]{专精伙伴}（14级）

本能能力——伙伴狂暴 你获得一个与你一同旅行并服从你命令的幼年动物伙伴。当你处于狂暴（特征）时，命令动物动作获得狂暴（特征）。你的动物伙伴获得狂暴动作，且其狂暴具有与你的狂暴相同的增益。你的动物伙伴获得狂暴疾行动作。

专精能力（7级） 将狂暴带来的额外伤害从2提高到4。若你拥有高等武器专精，则改为将狂暴带来的额外伤害提高到8。

狂暴抗力（9级） 你对穿刺与挥砍伤害获得抗力。

You have found that your strength is bonded not only to the rage inside yourself, but the rage inside your partner—a mighty beast. Whether you were raised by wild animals, are the last remaining survivors of a monster that slew both of your clans, or have come to an uneasy truce with a terrible creature you've long dueled with, you have an impossible bond with a savage creature. Your shared desire to vanquish enemies and remain free from the burden of restraint binds you and your companions in a furious union.

Additional Feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.tpkJXDpSuGznfzGJ]{Mature Animal Companion} (4th), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.U52NMdeSNbjSSRHE]{Incredible Companion} (8th), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Fai5VMyrtOrYC5JL]{Specialized Companion} (14th)

Instinct Ability—Companion Rage You gain a young animal companion that travels with you and obeys your commands. While you are raging, the Command an Animal action gains the Rage trait. Your animal companion gains the Rage action and its Rage has the same benefits as your Rage. Your animal companion gains the Raging Stride action.

Specialization Ability (7th) Increase the additional damage from Rage from 2 to 4. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the additional damage from Rage to 8.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist piercing and slashing damage.

Ship Chain.name: 舰船锁链 Ship Chain
Ship Chain.description:
这条巨大的链条通常用于大型船只。末端可以安装不同类型的锚，使其除了作为武器使用外，还可用于为船只抛锚。

This enormous chain is normally used for large ships. The end can be affixed with different types of anchors, allowing it to be used to anchor ships in addition to its use as a weapon.

Dire Lance.name: 恐怖长枪 Dire Lance
Dire Lance.description:
恐惧长枪只能由真正强大之人挥舞，但它可作为长枪的有效替代品。若你在进行攻击之前的动作中移动至少30英尺，即使你未骑乘，你也会从比武特征获得对伤害的环境加值。

FoundryVTT 注记 PF2e 系统会以你单手持用为前提来自动处理比武特征。因此，在攻击前请相应调整你的持用方式。

The dire lance can only be wielded by the truly mighty, but it serves as an effective alternative to the lance. If you move at least 30 feet on the action before your attack, you gain the circumstance bonus to damage from the jousting trait even if you were not mounted.

FoundryVTT Note The PF2e system automates the jousting trait by assuming you are wielding it in one hand. As such, change your wield appropriately before attacking.

Shattered Response.name: 破碎回应 Shattered Response
Shattered Response.description:
触发 你的盾牌因你使用盾牌格挡而破损或被摧毁。

你的盾牌被摧毁使你的对手暴露在一次毁灭性的打击之下。对所需的敌人进行一次近战打击，该敌人在对抗你的打击时处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{off-guard}，并且该打击造成等同于盾牌在被摧毁时给予你的AC加值的额外伤害。如果你拥有高等武器专精，则该额外伤害加倍。

Trigger Your shield was broken or destroyed by your use of Shield Block.

The destruction of your shield leaves your opponent open to a devastating blow. Make a melee Strike against the required enemy, that enemy is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{off-guard} against your Strike and it deals additional damage equal to the AC Bonus the shield was granting you at the time it was destroyed. If you have greater weapon specialization, this additional damage is doubled.

Verdant Apotheosis.name: 翠绿神化 Verdant Apotheosis
Verdant Apotheosis.description:
你让自己与森林合而为一，引发巨大的变化。你施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.3526YUgCvB5ZsKuX]{坚定之心斗篷}。改变你所选择的能力之一所需的动作获得狂暴（特征）。

特殊 若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.eFNwXaWyXevCXx4O]{鞭笞树枝}职业专长，当你选择参天树干时，你的鞭笞树枝徒手攻击的伤害骰提高一级，且其获得擒抱特征。

You allow yourself to become one with the forest, heralding in massive change. You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.3526YUgCvB5ZsKuX]{Mantle of the Unwavering Heart}. The action needed to change one of your chosen abilities gains the Rage trait.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.eFNwXaWyXevCXx4O]{Lashing Branches} class feat, when you select Towering Trunk you increase the damage die of your lashing branch unarmed attack by one step and it gains the grapple trait.

Gifts of The Blood.name: 鲜血的赋礼 Gifts of The Blood
Gifts of The Blood.description:
血脉赐予你赋礼以及更强大的魔法。你获得一个1环法术位，并学会与你血脉相关联的1环法术。6级时，你获得一个2环法术位，并学会与你血脉相关联的2环法术。8级时，你获得一个3环法术位，并学会与你血脉相关联的3环法术。你只能使用这些法术位来施放由此专长授予你的法术。

The blood grants you gifts and more potent magic. You gain a 1st-rank spell slot and learn the 1st-rank spell associated with your bloodline. At 6th level, you gain a 2nd-rank spell slot and learn the 2nd-rank spell associated with your bloodline. At 8th level, you gain a 3rd-rank spell slot and learn the 3rd-rank spell associated with your bloodline. You can only use these spell slots to cast spells granted to you from this feat.

Flesh Instinct.name: 血肉本能 Flesh Instinct
Flesh Instinct.description:
你长久以来一直与一股无法熄灭且非自然的狂怒共存，它因你相互冲突的躯体构造而沸腾翻涌。你自己的身体散发出难以言说的欲望——在你的怒火中，这些欲望可能被欢迎，也可能被憎恶。你的身体在平时看起来正常，直到你进入狂暴，你的解剖结构才开始扭曲并改变。那些从小就与异界存在缔结束缚、或习惯性饮用奇异调制物的文化，最常信奉这种本能。你调和自己狂乱血肉的能力，可能是你要对抗或拥抱的事——取决于你是否顺从它的欲望。你在狂暴时也可能出现其他显现，例如奇怪的肿块、可怕的黏液，或其他异界特征。

本能能力——狂乱解剖 从下列列表中选择一种血肉显现。一旦做出选择便无法更改。在狂暴期间，你获得所选血肉显现的效果。将你从狂暴获得的伤害从2提高至3；若对抗的生物处于笨拙、目眩、耳聋、虚弱、着迷、恐惧、麻痹、震慑或痴呆状态，则提高至4。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.f0GvS1PVZEHnCcTr]{狂怒解剖}反应动作（）。

血肉显现

狂暴效果

特征

伤害

鼓胀孔洞

对抗会使你获得恶心（状态）的强韧豁免时，你承受–1状态减值。你对抗疾病的豁免获得+1状态加值。

酸, 嗅觉

酸

喋喋不休之口

当你尝试一个听觉动作（除你因本能选择而获得的动作之外），或有生物对你尝试一个听觉动作时，进行DC 5纯骰检定。若失败，你的动作失败，或你不会受到影响。

听觉, 音波

音波

长舌喙管

你为移除恶心（状态）而进行的强韧豁免承受–1减值。你对抗毒素的豁免获得+1状态加值。

专注

挥砍

触手丝缕

你获得等同于你等级一半（最低1）的挥砍伤害弱点。即使你的双手被占用，你仍可进行简单的交互动作，但不能尝试需要显著手部灵巧性的动作。

专注

穿刺

不眨之眼

对抗视觉效果时，你承受–1状态减值。你的察觉检定获得+1状态加值。

视觉, 虚无

虚无

扭曲痉挛

你的杂技与反射豁免承受–1状态减值。你的运动获得+1状态加值。

专注

钝击

专精能力（7级）将你从狂暴获得的伤害从3提高至7；若对抗的生物符合你本能能力的判定条件，则提高至8。若你拥有强效狂暴专精，则改为将你从狂暴获得的伤害提高至13；若对抗的生物符合你本能能力的判定条件，则提高至16。

狂暴抗力（9级）你抵抗精准伤害，以及你血肉显现的伤害类型。

You have long lived with an unquenchable and unnatural fury that boils from your conflicting anatomy. Your own body exudes desires of unspeakable kinds, desires that might be welcomed or despised in your rage. Your body appears normal until you enter a rage, where your anatomy begins to warp and change. Cultures who bind themselves to otherworldly beings or that imbibe strange concoctions routinely from a young age most commonly subscribe to this instinct. Your ability to reconcile your raging flesh is something you might battle or embrace, depending on whether you heed its desires. You may have other manifestations such as strange bumps, terrible mucus or otherwise otherworldly features that appear when you rage.

Instinct Ability—Raging Anatomy Select a flesh manifestation from the list below. Once this choice is made it cannot be changed. While raging, you gain the effects of your flesh manifestation. Increase your damage from Rage from 2 to 3, or 4 against creatures that are clumsy, dazzled, deafened, enfeebled, fascinated, frightened, paralyzed, stunned, or stupefied. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.f0GvS1PVZEHnCcTr]{Furious Anatomy} reaction.

Flesh Manifestation

Raging Effect

Traits

Damage

Billowing Orifice

You take a –1 status penalty against Fortitude saves that would give you the sickened condition. You gain a +1 status bonus to saves against diseases.

Acid, Olfactory

Acid

Gibbering Mouths

When you attempt an auditory action other than ones you gained from your choice of instinct or a creature attempts one against you, roll a DC 5 flat check. On a failure, your action fails or you fail to be affected.

Auditory, Sonic

Sonic

Tongue Proboscis

Fortitude saves you make to remove the sickened condition take a –1 penalty. You gain a +1 status bonus to saves against poisons.

Concentrate

Slashing

Tentacle Strands

You gain a weakness to slashing damage equal to half your level (minimum 1). You can take simple Interact actions even while your hands are full, but cannot attempt actions that require significant manual dexterity.

Concentrate

Piercing

Unblinking Eyes

You take a –1 status penalty against visual effects. You gain a +1 status bonus to Perception checks.

Visual, Void

Void

Warp Spasm

You take a –1 status penalty to Acrobatics and Reflex saves. You gain a +1 status bonus to Athletics.

Concentrate

Bludgeoning

Specialization Ability (7th) Increase the damage from Rage from 3 to 7, or 8 against creatures that meet your instinct ability’s criteria. If you have greater raging specialization, instead increase the damage from Rage to 13, or 16 against creatures that meet your instinct ability’s criteria.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist precision damage and the damage type of your flesh manifestation.

Die Another Day.name: 改日再死 Die Another Day
Die Another Day.description:
你的伤口翻涌不止，但死亡的召唤在危难与痛苦面前更进一步激励着你。当你处于受伤（状态）时，你获得等同于你受伤数值的环境加值加到豁免掷骰上；若这来自一个死亡效果，则该数值改为两倍。

Your wounds seethe, but the call of death invigorates you further in the face of peril and pain. When you have the wounded condition, you gain a circumstance bonus to saving throws equal to your wounded value, or twice that amount if it was a death effect.

Major Gifts of The Blood.name: 鲜血的重大赋礼 Major Gifts of The Blood
Major Gifts of The Blood.description:
随着你将身体锻炼至巅峰，作为回报的赋礼也攀升至新的高度。你获得一个7环法术位，并学会与你的血脉相关联的7环法术。在20级时，你获得一个8环法术位，并学会与你的血脉相关联的8环法术。你只能使用这些法术位来施放由此专长授予你的法术。

As you train your body to its pinnacle, the gifts in return reach new heights. You gain a 7th-rank spell slot and learn the 7th-rank spell associated with your bloodline. At 20th level, you gain a 8th-rank spell slot and learn the 8th-rank spell associated with your bloodline. You can only use these spell slots to cast spells granted to you from this feat.

Raging Blocker.name: 狂暴拦截者 Raging Blocker
Raging Blocker.description:
即使在拥抱情绪时，你也能专注于格挡。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡} 通用专长。当你使用盾牌格挡反应动作（）时，你可以让你的反应动作（）获得狂暴（特征），并花费你从狂暴中剩余的临时生命值，使你的盾牌的硬度在对抗触发该打击的那次攻击时提高等量。你在任何伤害结算之前失去这些临时生命值。

You are attuned to blocking even while embracing your emotions. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} general feat. When you use the Shield Block reaction, you may give your reaction the Rage trait and spend your remaining temporary Hit Points from Rage to increase your shield’s hardness by an equal amount against the triggering Strike. You lose these temporary Hit Points before any damage is applied.

This Looks Important.name: 这看起来很重要 This Looks Important
This Looks Important.description:
你不需要知道它有什么效果就能意识到这是个问题。对一个会受到你狂暴的额外伤害的目标进行三次打击。每次打击都以你正常的多重攻击减值进行。这些打击中每次成功的打击都会使目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态）}状态，其数值等于成功打击的次数，持续1分钟。若某次打击是重击，则笨拙（状态）的数值增加1。若这些打击的目标不再符合你狂暴额外伤害的条件（例如丢下所持握的武器或失去构装体（特征）），他们也会失去该笨拙（状态）。无论结果如何，目标随后在1天内暂时免疫。

You don’t need to know what it does to recognize that it’s a problem. Make three Strikes against a target that would take the increased damage from your Rage. Each of these Strikes is made at your normal multiple attack penalty. The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} condition with a value equal to the number of successful Strikes for 1 minute. If a Strike is a critical hit, the value of the clumsy condition is increased by 1. If the target of these Strikes would no longer qualify for your increased rage damage (such as dropping a wielded weapon or losing the construct trait) they also lose this clumsy condition. Regardless of the outcome, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 day.

Furious Concoction.name: 狂怒调合物 Furious Concoction
Furious Concoction.description:
成本 2 瓶多用小瓶

需求 你的器具中有 2 瓶多用小瓶。

你几乎不顾健康地尝试饮用实验品，只能祈祷结果最好。你使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.i0Urwze7pbBPVx3X]{Mad Science} 并从你的器具中消耗 2 瓶多用小瓶，但你不会获得所饮用变异药剂的效果。取而代之的是，你调制出一种持续 1 分钟的狂怒合剂。狂怒合剂的效果与副作用由随机决定：先掷一次 [[/r d20]] 来决定效果，再掷另一次 d20 来决定副作用。需要进行豁免的效果使用你的职业DC。

d20

效果

副作用

1

灾难酿剂 为第二个副作用掷骰。忽略任何掷出包含 1 或 20 的结果。

可怕副作用 掷两次并承受 2 个副作用。忽略任何掷出包含 1 的结果。

2-4

巨幅生长 你的体型变为超大型，使你的触及增加 10 尺（若你原本为大型或更小），你的装备也会随之变大。在持续时间内，你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

爆炸 你爆炸，对 5 尺弥漫范围内的所有生物（包括你自己）造成 @Damage[10d6[fire]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDC] 豁免。

5-7

怪异双翼 你获得 45 尺的飞行速度。

麻木大脑 在持续时间内，你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}。

8-10

额外肢体 获得一对额外的手臂来帮助你攻击。你所有攻击的多重攻击减值在进行第二次攻击时为 -3（若为灵巧则为 -2），在进行第三次或后续攻击时为 -6（若为灵巧则为 -4）。

陌生构造 当你进行带有操作（特征）的行动时，你必须尝试进行一次 DC 5 纯骰检定，否则该行动失效。

11-13

诡异之眼 你获得一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{真知术} 法术的效果，其法术阶级等于你等级的一半，反制调整值等于你的职业DC - 10。

你为什么要喝那个？！ 你承受 @Damage[2d8[persistent,poison]] 伤害，直到你停止狂暴为止。

14-16

钢铁皮肤 你获得等同于你的狂暴抗力的全体物理伤害抗力。

紊乱细胞 在 1 小时内，你从具有治疗（特征）的法术或物品中恢复的生命值只有原来的一半。

17-19

吐息武器 你获得一个吐息武器，作为一个 2-行动行动，在一个 @Template[distance:20|type:cone] 内造成 @Damage[15d6] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDC] 豁免。伤害类型为寒冷或火焰伤害，在你使用狂怒合剂时随机决定。你使用吐息武器后，在 [[/r 1d4]] 轮内无法再次使用。

破碎之躯 在该效果期间，你第一次受到重击时，你失去部分灵活性，AC 承受 –1 减值，且你的所有速度承受 –10 尺的状态减值。

20

奇迹酿剂 掷两次并获得 2 个效果。忽略任何掷出包含 1 或 20 的结果。

惊人益处 为第二个效果掷骰。忽略任何掷出包含 1 或 20 的结果。

Cost 2 versatile vials

Requirements You have 2 versatile vials in your apparatus.

With little regard for health, you experiment with consumption and hope for the best. You use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.i0Urwze7pbBPVx3X]{Mad Science} and consume 2 versatile vials from your apparatus, but do not gain the effects of the mutagens you consume. Instead, you create a furious concoction that lasts for 1 minute. The effects and drawbacks of a furious concoction are randomly determined by rolling a [[/r d20]] to determine the effect and then another d20 to determine the drawback. An effect that requires a saving throw uses your class DC.

d20

Effect

Drawback

1

Disastrous Brew Roll for a second drawback. Ignore any rolls that include 1 or 20.

Terrible Drawbacks Roll twice and take 2 drawbacks. Ignore any rolls that include 1.

2-4

Massive Growth You become Huge, increasing your reach by 10 feet (if you were Large or smaller) and your equipment grows in size with you. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for the duration.

Explode You explode dealing @Damage[10d6[fire]] damage with a @Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDC] save in a 5-foot emanation, including yourself.

5-7

Monstrous Wings You gain a fly Speed of 45 feet.

Numbed Brain You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for the duration.

8-10

Extra Limbs Gain an extra set of arms that help you attack. Your multiple attack penalty on all attacks is -3 or (-2 if agile) on your second attack, or -6 (-4 if agile) on your third or subsequent attacks.

Unfamiliar Anatomy When you take an action with the manipulate trait, you must attempt a DC 5 flat check or the action is lost.

11-13

Bizarre Eyes You gain the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight} spell of a rank equal to half your level with a counteract modifier equal to your class DC - 10.

Why Did You Drink That?! You take @Damage[2d8[persistent,poison]] damage until you stop raging.

14-16

Steel Skin You gain resistance to all physical damage equal to your raging resistance.

Scrambled Cells You restore half as many Hit Points from spells or items with the healing trait for 1 hour.

17-19

Breath Weapon You gain a breath weapon that deals @Damage[15d6] damage with a @Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDC] save in a @Template[distance:20|type:cone] as a 2-action activity. The damage is either cold or fire damage, determined at random when you use Furious Concoction. After you use your breath weapon you cannot use it again for [[/r 1d4]] rounds.

Broken Body The first time you are critically hit during this effect, you lose some of your agility and take a –1 penalty to AC and a –10-foot status penalty to all your Speeds.

20

Miraculous Brew Roll twice and take 2 effects. Ignore any rolls that include 1 or 20.

Surprising Benefits Roll for a second effect. Ignore any rolls that include 1 or 20.

Sanctified Rage.name: 圣化狂暴 Sanctified Rage
Sanctified Rage.description:
当你狂暴时，你会获得你的神祇的祝福。当你狂暴，你会变得神圣化，并且你的打击获得与你的神圣化相同的特征。根据你所选择的神祇，你获得圣洁或邪秽（特征）特征之一。如果根据你的神祇你“可以是”圣洁或邪秽（特征），你在第一次获得此专长时做出该选择；如果你“必须是”圣洁或邪秽（特征），你会自动获得该特征。若你以某种方式获得了相反的特征，你会失去先前的特征，直到你完成一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} 仪式。

When you are raging, you gain the blessing of your deity. When you rage, you become sanctified and your Strikes gain the trait of your sanctification. You gain either the holy or unholy trait, depending on your selection of deity. If you “can be” holy or unholy according to your deity, you make that choice when you first gain this feat, and if you “must be” holy or unholy you gain the trait automatically. If you gain the opposing trait in some way, you lose the previous trait until you complete an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} ritual.

Allies of the Calamity.name: 灾厄的盟友 Allies of the Calamity
Allies of the Calamity.description:
你知道如何在危险的近距离下仍让盟友保持安全。在你的每日准备期间，你可以选择至多6名盟友，使其在你狂暴时不受你的灵光散发影响。

You know how to keep your allies safe despite your dangerous proximity. During your daily preparations, you can select up to 6 allies to be excluded from your emanation while raging.

Heart of a Giant.name: 巨人之心 Heart of a Giant
Heart of a Giant.description:
你与身形伟岸的存在之间的联系赋予你压迫性的气质。当你处于狂暴时，若你的体型大于目标，你对威吓获得+1状态加值。每当一个生物在对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱} 的检定中掷骰出现失败时，改为大失败。

Your ties to beings of incredible stature gives you an imposing nature. While raging, you gain a +1 status bonus to Demoralize when you are larger than the target. Whenever a creature rolls a failure on a check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} you, they get a critical failure instead.

Silent.name: 无声 Silent
Silent.description:
你那凶猛的本性被囚禁在你无情的外表之下。你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.a9PzINjFTO5GvAJN]{Quick-Tempered} 自由动作（）会在你为先攻掷骰而掷骰潜行时触发。你从野蛮人（职业）获得的训练技能为潜行而非运动，并且在你狂暴时，你进行用于躲藏与潜行的潜行检定获得+1环境加值。若你在狂暴时进行任何带有听觉（特征）的动作，你会在本次狂暴的持续时间内失去这些检定的环境加值。当你对一个你处于对其隐藏或未察觉状态的敌人进行一次成功的打击时，你会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated} 状态，直到你的下个回合结束。你获得“潜踪一击”行动。

振奋加值 你获得临时生命值，并且你对潜行检定的环境加值提升至+2。

Your fierceness is held captive beneath your emotionless exterior. Your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.a9PzINjFTO5GvAJN]{Quick-Tempered} free action is triggered when you roll Stealth for initiative. You’re trained in Stealth instead of Athletics from the barbarian class and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to Hide and Sneak while you are raging. If you take any actions with the auditory trait while raging, you lose your circumstance bonus to these checks for the duration of your rage. When you make a successful Strike against an enemy you are hidden or undetected to, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated} until the end of your next turn. You gain the Stalking Stroke activity.

Invigoration Bonus You gain temporary Hit Points and your circumstance bonus to Stealth checks increases to +2.

Forever Furious.name: 永远狂怒 Forever Furious
Forever Furious.description:
即使你的身体通常会撑不住，你的活力仍会持续，使你能够触及自身存在的内在部分来获得你的能力。你在未处于狂暴时获得一半的狂暴抗力，并且只要这些能力通常不会结束你的狂暴或使你获得疲乏（状态），你就可以在未处于狂暴时使用带有狂暴（特征）的动作或活动。

Your vigor persists even when your body would normally give out, tapping into the inner part of your being to access your abilities. You gain half your raging resistance when you are not raging and can use actions or activities with the rage trait while not raging so long as those abilities would not normally end your Rage or give you the fatigued condition.

Disaster Instinct.name: 灾害本能 Disaster Instinct
Disaster Instinct.description:
灾害展现了世界翻涌的狂怒，而你发现此类劫难大有可学之处。你可能曾被闪电击中、在洪水后从死亡中被救回，或是一个奉献于火山灵的古老氏族成员。无论你的道路如何，你都力求在世界最糟糕时将其暴烈之力具象化，并在你迈出的每一步中携带着它。

本能能力——灾厄狂怒 在战斗中，你会留下与你所契合之灾害的残迹。将你从狂怒获得的伤害从2提升至3。从下表中选择一种灾害。一旦做出此选择便无法更改。当你进入狂怒时，你会在自身周围5尺放射中散发出与之相关类型的能量。在该放射中结束其回合的生物会受到@Damage[(max(1,@actor.flags.pf2e.disasterInstinct.damage))[@actor.flags.pf2e.disasterInstinct.trait]]点与你所选择灾害相关类型的伤害。你的狂怒动作获得原能（特征），以及你所选择灾害的特征。当你进入狂怒以及在狂怒期间每个回合开始时，你可以选择压制你的放射，直到你下个回合开始。

灾害

伤害

特征

雪崩

寒冷

寒冷

地震

钝击

土

喷发

火焰

火焰

洪水

钝击

水

风暴

电击

电击

龙卷风

钝击

风

专精能力（7级） 将你从狂怒获得的额外伤害从3提升至7，并将你的放射伤害提升至2。如果你具有强效武器专精，则改为将你从狂怒获得的额外伤害提升至13，并将你的放射伤害提升至4；且当你进入狂怒时，你可以选择让你的放射为10尺放射而非5尺放射。

狂怒抗力（9级） 你对与你所选择灾害相关类型的伤害获得抗力。

Disasters exemplify the churning rage of the world, and you have found that such calamities have much to teach. You may have been struck by lightning, resuscitated from death after a flood, or be a member of an ancient clan dedicated to a volcanic spirit. Whatever your path, you strive to personify the violent powers of the world at its worst, carrying it with you in each of your steps.

Instinct Ability—Calamitous Rage In battle, you leave behind the remnants of your aligned disaster. Increase your damage from Rage from 2 to 3. Choose a disaster from the list below. Once this choice is made it cannot be changed. When you Rage, you radiate with energy of the associated type in a 5-foot emanation. Creatures that end their turn in the emanation take @Damage[(max(1,@actor.flags.pf2e.disasterInstinct.damage))[@actor.flags.pf2e.disasterInstinct.trait]] damage of the type associated with your chosen disaster. Your Rage action gains the primal trait, as well as the trait of your chosen disaster. When you Rage and at the start of each turn while raging, you can choose to suppress your emanation until the beginning of your next turn.

Disaster

Damage

Trait

Avalanche

cold

cold

Earthquake

bludgeoning

earth

Eruption

fire

fire

Flood

bludgeoning

water

Storm

electricity

electricity

Tornado

bludgeoning

air

Specialization Ability (7th) Increase the additional damage from Rage from 3 to 7 and increase the damage of your emanation to 2. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the additional damage from Rage to 13 and increase the damage of your emanation to 4 and you can choose to have your emanation be a 10-foot emanation instead of a 5-foot emanation when you Rage.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist damage of the type associated with your chosen disaster.

Moonscythe.name: 月镰 Moonscythe
Moonscythe.description:
这把镰刀是双刃的，要么两片刃形成新月形并在镰刀尖端汇合，要么沿着杆的一侧贯穿整个长度。

This scythe is double blade, either with the blades forming a crescent that joins as the tip of the scythe, or that travels the length of the pole on one side.

Shape of the Ancestor.name: 祖灵之形 Shape of the Ancestor
Shape of the Ancestor.description:
需求 你的遗珍武器在你持有中。

当显现时，你祖先的外貌会变得更加明显，你们之间那种诡异的相似令人不寒而栗。即使你未处于狂暴中，你也会呈现你祖先的性相。此形态与真实形态具有相同的年代与体型，并拥有大致对应的身体特征，例如发色。使用先祖之形视为为用于欺瞒的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} 用途而进行伪装。当你呈现你祖先的性相时，你在进行交涉检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} 时获得+1环境加值，并在进行威吓检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} 时获得+1环境加值，但仅限于目标未察觉你的真实形态时。若你至少为15级，你在真实形态与此形态下的检定也会获得该环境加值。

Requirements Your vestige weapon is in your possession.

Your ancestor’s appearance becomes more prominent while manifested, bearing an uncanny resemblance between you both is uncanny. You take on the aspects of your ancestor even when you are not raging. This form is the same age and body type as your true form and has roughly analogous physical traits, such as hair color. Using Shape of the Ancestor counts as creating a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} use of Deception. While you are taking on the aspects of your ancestor, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} and to Intimidation checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce}, but only while the target is unaware of your true form. If you are at least 15th level, you gain the circumstance bonus to checks in your true form and in this form.

Unravel Into Runes.name: 解构为符文 Unravel Into Runes
Unravel Into Runes.description:
你以你的生命与灵魂强化你的符文，使你自身只剩下虚无的空气，以及在你曾经占据的空间中游动的发光符记。你变为无形体态持续4轮，无法进行攻击，并获得等同于你等级的对所有伤害的抗力。若你进入一名盟友的空间，你可以选择给予他们你符文的效果，并使其伤害掷骰获得+4状态加值。若你在给予盟友你符文的效果后离开该盟友的空间，或该盟友陷入昏迷，此效果立即结束。当此效果结束时，你返回你的实体形态；若你当时正给予一名盟友你符文的效果，你会出现在其相邻的一个方格中。

You empower your runes with your life and soul, leaving you as nothing but empty air and glowing sigils swimming through the space that you once occupied. You become incorporeal for 4 rounds, cannot make attacks, and gain resistance to all damage equal to your level. If you enter the space of an ally, you can choose to give them the effects of your runes and you grant them a +4 status bonus to damage rolls. If you leave your ally’s space after you granted them the effects of your runes or your ally becomes unconscious, this effect immediately ends. When this effect ends, you return to your physical form and if you were granting an ally the effects of your runes, you appear in a square adjacent to them.

Protective Wrath.name: 守护之怒 Protective Wrath
Protective Wrath.description:
触发 30英尺内的一个生物对一名盟友造成重击。

需求 你未处于狂暴中。

你不会允许那些伤害你朋友的人再次伤害他们，即使你已精疲力竭。你使用狂暴。即使你不满足需求，你也可以进入狂暴，例如当你处于疲乏时。如果你处于疲乏，你的狂暴只会持续4轮而非正常持续时间，并且在你的狂暴结束后，直到你不再疲乏之前，你都无法再次使用保护之怒。

Trigger A creature within 30 feet critically hits an ally.

Requirements You’re not raging.

You won't allow those who hurt your friends to hurt them again, even if you are exhausted of your strength. You use Rage. You can Rage even if you do not meet the requirements, such as if you are fatigued. If you’re fatigued, your rage only lasts for 4 rounds instead of the normal duration and after your Rage ends you cannot use Protective Wrath again until you are no longer fatigued.

One With The Animal.name: 与兽合一 One With The Animal
One With The Animal.description:
你获得化为自身动物形态的能力。你变为与你的本能相关联类型的动物，持续1分钟。处于此形态时，你无法说话或使用带有语言（特征）的动作，且你的道具会被吸收进体内；你的道具的恒定能力仍会运作，但你无法启动任何物品。处于此形态时，你获得动物（特征）、昏暗视觉，以及射程为30尺的模糊感官：嗅觉。你会保持此形态，直到你解消该效果。你可以在此形态下@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{狂暴}，若你如此做，该效果结束，并在狂暴期间变回你的正常形态。你获得你在狂暴期间被授予的徒手攻击，但你将伤害骰降低2个阶梯。若你的徒手攻击的伤害骰为d6或更低，你在此形态下不会获得该徒手攻击。只要你处于此形态，你就获得如下所列的数据。

蚂蚁、螳螂、蝎子、蜘蛛 你的体型为超小型，拥有射程为30尺的模糊感官：震动感知，且具有30尺的攀爬速度。

猿、熊、猫、蛇 你的体型为中型，具有30尺的攀爬速度，且你的嗅觉为精确感官，而非模糊感官。

甲龙、雷龙、象、霸王龙 你的体型为大型，拥有10尺触及，且笨拙1。

蝙蝠、鸟、黄蜂 你获得30尺的飞行速度。

野猪、公牛、鹿、独角兽 你的速度获得+20尺状态加值。

螃蟹、青蛙、虎鲸、海豹、鲨鱼 你获得30尺的游泳速度，且可以在水下呼吸。

鳄鱼、乌龟 你获得30尺的游泳速度，且AC获得+1状态加值。

伶盗龙、狼 你的速度获得+10尺状态加值，且你的嗅觉为精确感官，而非模糊感官。

You gain the ability to assume the form of your animal. You change into an animal of the type associated with your instinct for 1 minute. You cannot speak or take actions with the linguistic trait while in this form and your gear is absorbed into you; the constant abilities of your gear still function, and you can't activate any items. You gain the animal trait, low-light vision, and an imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet while in this form. You remain in this form until you Dismiss the effect. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{Rage} while in this form, and if you do you the effect ends and assume your normal form while raging. You gain the unarmed attacks granted to you while raging, but you reduce the damage die by 2 steps. If your unarmed attack’s damage die is d6 or lower, you do not gain that unarmed attack while in this form. You gain the listed statistics as long as you are in this form.

Ant, Mantis, Scorpion, Spider You are Tiny in size, have tremorsense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet, and a climb Speed of 30 feet.

Ape, Bear, Cat, Snake You are Medium in size, have a climb Speed of 30 feet and your scent is a precise sense instead of an imprecise sense.

Akylosaurus, Brontosaurus, Elephant, Tyrannosaurus You are Large in size, have 10 feet of reach, and are clumsy 1.

Bat, Bird, Wasp You gain a fly Speed of 30 feet.

Boar, Bull, Deer, Unicorn You gain a +20-foot status bonus to your Speed.

Crab, Frog, Orca, Seal, Shark You gain a swim Speed of 30 feet and can breath underwater.

Crocodile, Turtle You gain a swim Speed of 30 feet and a +1 status bonus to AC.

Velociraptor, Wolf You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speed and your scent is a precise sense instead of an imprecise sense.

Overkiller.name: 过度杀伤者 Overkiller
Overkiller.description:
你已经学会以他人挥舞长剑般的方式，轻松挥舞那些力量需求荒诞的“不可能武器”。选择一种具有过量特征的进阶武器。就熟练度而言，你将所选武器视为军用武器。

You have learned to wield impossible weapons with absurd strength requirements as easily as others wield a sword. Choose one advanced weapon with the overkill trait. For the purposes of proficiency, you treat the chosen weapon as a martial weapon.

Living Cataclysm.name: 活体灾变 Living Cataclysm
Living Cataclysm.description:
你是一场活生生的灾害。你在一个与自身灾害相关类型的@Template[distance:30|type:emanation]内，造成@Damage[8d6[@actor.flags.pf2e.disasterInstinct.trait]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[basic:true|type:fortitude|against:classDC]豁免，产生所列出的效果。此效果以及任何由你的灾害产生的效果，其DC使用你的职业DC。

雪崩 该区域变为困难地形，持续1分钟，且初始豁免大失败的生物将处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}状态，直到其@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}。

地震 你制造三条@Template[distance:15|type:line]{15尺线}的更困难地形，持续1分钟，且初始豁免大失败的生物会被击倒为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

喷发 区域内所有生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态，持续1分钟；区域外所有生物对区域内生物而言也为隐蔽。初始豁免大失败的生物会受到等同于你等级一半的@Damage[(floor(@actor.level / 2))[persistent,fire]]伤害。

洪水 除你以外，所有在1分钟内于该区域结束其回合的生物必须尝试一次@Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDc]豁免，否则被推离5尺，朝向该涌出范围的边缘（大失败则为10尺）。初始豁免大失败的生物会被击倒为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

风暴 区域内所有生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态，持续1分钟；区域外所有生物对区域内生物而言也为隐蔽。初始豁免大失败的生物会被推离10尺，方向由你选择。

龙卷风 除你以外，所有在1分钟内于该区域结束其回合的生物必须尝试一次@Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDc]豁免，否则被推离5尺，朝向该涌出范围的中心（大失败则为10尺）。初始豁免大失败的生物会被击倒为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

You are a living cataclysm. You deal @Damage[8d6[@actor.flags.pf2e.disasterInstinct.trait]] damage with a @Check[basic:true|type:fortitude|against:classDC] save in a @Template[distance:30|type:emanation] of a type associated with your disaster with the listed effect. The DC of this effect and any effect produced by your disaster uses your class DC.

Avalanche The area becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute and creatures that critically fail their initial save are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until they @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}.

Earthquake You create three @Template[distance:15|type:line]{15-foot lines} of greater difficult terrain for 1 minute and creatures that critically fail their initial save are knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Eruption All creatures within the area become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} for 1 minute and all creatures outside the area become concealed to creatures within it. Creatures that critically fail their initial save take @Damage[(floor(@actor.level / 2))[persistent,fire]] damage equal to half your level.

Flood All creatures other than you that end their turn within the area for 1 minute must attempt a @Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDc] save or be pushed 5 feet towards the edge of the emanation (or 10 feet on a critical failure). Creatures that critically fail the initial save are knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Storm All creatures within the area become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} for 1 minute and all creatures outside the area become concealed to creatures within it. Creatures that critically fail their initial save are pushed 10 feet in a direction of your choice.

Tornado All creatures other than you that end their turn within the area for 1 minute must attempt a @Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:classDc] save or be pushed 5 feet towards the center of the emanation (or 10 feet on a critical failure). Creatures that critically fail their initial save are knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Brutal Pugilist.name: 残酷拳斗士 Brutal Pugilist
Brutal Pugilist.description:
你摒弃对人造刀刃的需求，转而将自己最致命的武器——赤手空拳——投入战斗。当你狂暴时，你的拳击将伤害骰从1d4变为1d6，失去灵巧、非致命与灵巧特征，并获得强力与双手d10特征。

当你用双手使用拳击时，你必须如同使用具有双手特征的武器那样，以交互动作重新握持并放开。此外，当你使用双手的徒手打击时，除非你拥有某项能力能让你在双手持用武器时也被视为拥有空手，否则你不被视为拥有空手。若你在狂暴时未持用任何物品，你可以决定你的拳击采用哪种握法。

You eschew the need for man-made blades, instead flinging yourself into battle with your most lethal weapons: your bare hands. While raging, your fist changes damage dice to 1d6 instead of 1d4, loses the agile, nonlethal, and finesse traits, and gains the forceful and two-hand d10 traits.

When you use your fists with two hands, you must Interact to re-grip and release as normal for using a two-hand trait weapon. In addition, while using your two-handed unarmed Strikes, you are not considered to have free hand unless you would have an ability that would do so while you are wielding a weapon in two hands. You can decide which grip you are using for your fists when you Rage if you are unarmed.

One With the Planes.name: 与诸位面合一 One With the Planes
One With the Planes.description:
你的身体已经适应了位面的二元性，使你能够将自身的联结转移到另一个位面。选择一个你在1级时所选位面以外的位面。在你的每日准备期间，你可以选择使自己与所选位面协调一致，或与您在获得此专长时所选的位面协调一致。就你的本能能力以及以你的本能作为先决条件的专长而言，你在每日准备期间所选择的位面对应的裂隙野蛮人。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长，每次都选择另一个位面。

Your body has adapted to the duality of the planes, allowing you to shift your connection to another plane. Choose a plane other than the one you chose at 1st level. During your daily preparations, you can choose to align yourself with your chosen plane or the one you selected when you took this feat. For the purposes of your instinct abilities and feats with your instinct as prerequisites, you are a breach barbarian of the plane you selected during your daily preparations.

Special You can select this feat multiple times, each time selecting another plane.

Legacy Unravels.name: 遗产瓦解 Legacy Unravels
Legacy Unravels.description:
火炬的传承几乎已经完成，当你开始为你的遗珍武器树立新的遗产。你唤起遗产的力量，使你的遗珍武器获得你所选择的一种武器符文的增益：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Wm0X7Pfd1bfocPSv]{Corrosive}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M5M1WJ5KzbYfRGsY]{Frost}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qlunQzfnzPQpMG6U]{Returning}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.NVst7e69agGG9Qwd]{Shock}，或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.dTxbaa7HSiJbIuNN]{Thundering}。该符文会在你处于狂暴状态且你正持用你的遗珍武器期间持续存在。若你将使一把武器拥有超过其正常上限的更多属性符文，则其中一个既有的属性符文（由你选择）会被压制，直到你解消该效果或该效果结束。

若你至少为15级，将 keen 加入你可选择的符文列表，同时也可选择 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.vQUIUAFOTOWj3ohh]{corrosive}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.RSZwUlCzUX7Nb4UA]{flaming}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sexud7FdxIrg50vU]{frost}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TEa1oKZbwsOvC6TZ]{shock} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Lb7F2BR9X9TF1vjX]{thundering} 的强效类型。

The passing of the torch is nearly complete, as you begin to set the new legacy for your vestige weapon. You call upon the power of your legacy and your vestige weapon gains the benefits of a weapon rune you choose: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Wm0X7Pfd1bfocPSv]{Corrosive}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.M5M1WJ5KzbYfRGsY]{Frost}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.qlunQzfnzPQpMG6U]{Returning}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.NVst7e69agGG9Qwd]{Shock}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.dTxbaa7HSiJbIuNN]{Thundering}. The rune lasts for as long as you are raging and you are wielding your vestige weapon. If you would give a weapon more property runes than its normal maximum, one of the existing property runes (you choose) is suppressed until you Dismiss the effect or the effect ends.

If you are at least 15th level, add keen to the list of runes you can choose as well as the greater types of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.vQUIUAFOTOWj3ohh]{corrosive}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.RSZwUlCzUX7Nb4UA]{flaming}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Sexud7FdxIrg50vU]{frost}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TEa1oKZbwsOvC6TZ]{shock}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Lb7F2BR9X9TF1vjX]{thundering}.

Attuned Fury.name: 谐调之怒 Attuned Fury
Attuned Fury.description:
你已学会通过你的狂暴来让自己与其他文化同调，并接纳其原则。你可以在某个聚落或具有文化重要性的地点花费 1 周的休整模式时间，该地点需能体现另一种野蛮人本能，例如巨人本能的巨人聚落，或迷信本能的法师杀手社群。完成后，你会与该本能同调。只要你保持同调，你就会获得该野蛮人本能的禁忌。当你与该野蛮人本能同调时，你每天可以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{Rage} 1 次，视同你是该本能的野蛮人；并且当你以这种方式狂暴时，你获得你在狂暴期间按该等级野蛮人本应拥有的任何本能能力，而不是你狂暴的正常效果。若你曾违反某个已同调本能的禁忌，你照常承受禁忌的效果，并且不再同调。在你离开你最初与某个本能同调的地点或文化满 1 周后，你将不再同调，并且必须在合适地点再花费 1 周的休整模式时间才能再次同调。

You have learned to attune yourself to other cultures and embrace their principles through your rage. You can spend 1 week of downtime in a settlement or place of cultural importance that exemplifies another barbarian instinct, such as a giant settlement for the giant instinct or a community of mage slayers for the superstition instinct. After doing so, you become attuned to that instinct. You gain the anathema of that barbarian instinct as long as you are attuned. While attuned to this barbarian instinct, you can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{Rage} once per day as if you were a barbarian of that instinct and you gain any instinct abilities you would possess as if you were a barbarian of that level while raging in this way instead of the normal effects of your rage. If you ever violate the anathema of an attuned instinct, you suffer the effects of anathema as normal and are no longer attuned. After you spend 1 week away from the location or culture you first became attuned to an instinct, you are no longer attuned and must spend another week of downtime in an appropriate location to become attuned again.

Void Decay.name: 虚空腐朽 Void Decay
Void Decay.description:
你的毒素已经腐蚀到无以复加，甚至能腐蚀生命本身。当你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{狂暴} 时，你可以选择将狂暴带来的额外伤害从毒素伤害改为虚能伤害，并且你的狂暴失去毒素（特征）并获得虚能（特征）。你仍会如腐烂狂暴的常规规则那样，在你每个回合结束时受到伤害。

特殊 若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.JMyGvyYIG9ZSek9d]{渗出腐朽}，你可以选择造成持续虚能伤害而非毒素伤害，并且只要该持续伤害仍在继续，生物从治疗效果中恢复的生命值减半，而不是影响该生物的视野。

Your poison has become so utterly corrosive that it corrodes life itself. When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{Rage} you can choose to change the additional damage from your rage to void damage instead of poison damage and your Rage loses the poison trait and gains the void trait. You still take damage at the end of each of your turns as normal for rotting rage.

Special If you have @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.JMyGvyYIG9ZSek9d]{Exude Decay}, you can choose to deal persistent void damage instead of poison damage, and a creature regains half as many Hit Points from healing effects as long as the persistent damage continues instead of affecting the creature’s vision.

Instinct Crown (Wildblood).name: 本能王冠（野性血脉） Instinct Crown (Wildblood)
Instinct Crown (Wildblood).description:
本能王冠是一种魔法头饰，注入了野蛮人在战斗中汲取的本能精粹。每顶王冠都会被制作成与其所系连的本能相对应的形象，例如动物本能王冠会做成狼头，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的简朴头盔。佩戴时，王冠使你能更进一步挖掘你的本能；若王冠的精粹与你的本能相符，则给予你更强大的增益。你必须能够狂暴才能使用王冠的启动。

启动 F 想象

频率 每日一次

触发 你掷骰先攻

效果 你进入狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启动 2 命令、想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每日一次

效果 你的狂血不假思索地行动。直到你的狂暴结束前，你获得加速。你可以使用你的额外动作来使用血涌。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect Your wildblood acts without a thought. You become quickened until the end of your rage. You can use your extra action to use blood surge.

Instinct Crown (Flesh).name: 本能王冠（血肉） Instinct Crown (Flesh)
Instinct Crown (Flesh).description:
本能王冠是一种注入野蛮人在战斗中汲取之本能精华的魔法头饰。每顶王冠都会被塑造成其所绑定本能的象征，例如动物本能王冠会做成狼头造型，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的简朴头盔。佩戴时，王冠能让你更深入地触及你的本能；若王冠的精华与你的本能相匹配，你将获得更强的增益。你必须能够狂暴才能使用王冠的启动能力。

启动 F 想象

频率 每日一次

触发 你掷骰先攻

效果 你狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启动 2 命令、想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每日一次

效果 你让血肉的显现得以掌控。你对抗心灵效果的意志豁免获得+2状态加值。若你是某个心灵效果的目标生物，且你的豁免掷骰大成功，你可以立即将该效果反向指向该生物，使其如同它才是该效果的目标一般受到影响。只要你将这些效果反向指向的生物仍受该效果影响，它们就会触发你狂暴所带来的额外伤害。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect You allow the manifestations of flesh to take hold. You gain a +2 status bonus to Will saves against mental effects. If you are the target creature of a mental effect and you critically succeed at your saving throw, you can immediately direct the effect back to that creature and they are affected as if they were the target of the effect. Creatures you direct these effects back to trigger your additional damage from rage as long as they are affected by that effect.

Spirit Empathy.name: 灵魂共感 Spirit Empathy
Spirit Empathy.description:
你拥有一种不可思议的本领，能够向你周围的灵魂伸出触角。在接下来的1小时内，由于附近的灵魂会协助你完成目标，你可以以+1状态加值进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} 活动。若在此期间你进入一场与灵魂或作祟之物的遭遇，你的先攻检定获得+2环境加值。若你拥有武器专精，该状态加值提升为+2；若你拥有高等武器专精，则提升为+3。

You have the uncanny knack for reaching out to the spirits around you. For the next hour, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} activities with a +1 status bonus as spirits nearby aid you in your endeavor. If during this time you enter an encounter with a spirit or haunt, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Initiative check. The status bonus increases to +2 if you have weapon specialization, or to +3 if you have greater weapon specialization.

Zealot Instinct.name: 狂热者本能 Zealot Instinct
Zealot Instinct.description:
你以神祇之名投身战斗，意在摧毁一切阻挡你神祇计划之人。从虔诚的艾奥梅黛十字军，到可怖的罗伐古格狂暴祭司，狂热者是所有信奉诸神之人中最缺乏纪律、却也或许最为坚定的信徒。

本能能力——神赐狂暴 神圣的伟力如鼓点般在你体内搏动，你以血腥之拳贯彻你神祇的愤怒。选择一位神祇。你获得所选神祇的典范与禁忌。你处于狂暴时，你可以将狂暴提供的额外伤害从2提高至3，并将其伤害类型改为灵魂，而非你的武器或徒手攻击的伤害类型。此灵魂伤害对虔信你神祇的生物或受你神祇庇护的生物没有效果。你获得你神祇某个领域的初始领域法术；对你而言，该领域法术具有狂暴（特征）。如果你获得的领域法术可以被维持，则对该法术的维持动作获得狂暴（特征）。你起始拥有一个包含1聚能点的聚能池，且你的领域法术是神术法术。你在法术攻击调整值与法术DC上受训。你的施法能力为魅力。

如果你做出足够多违背你神祇禁忌的行为，你将失去那些源于你与神祇联结的能力。你失去哪些职业特性由GM决定，但很可能包括你通过神赐狂暴造成灵魂伤害的能力以及你的领域法术。你只有通过进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone}仪式忏悔，才能重新获得这些能力。

专精能力（7级） 将狂暴提供的额外伤害从3提高至7。如果你拥有高等狂暴专精，则改为将狂暴的伤害提高至13。

狂暴抗力（9级） 你对灵魂伤害与心灵伤害具有抗力。

You wage into battle in the name of your deity with the intent of destroying those who stand in the way of your god's plan. From devout crusaders of Iomedae to terrible ragepriests of Rovagug, zealots are the least disciplined but perhaps the firmest believers of all of a gods following.

Instinct Ability—Godsent Rage The might of the divine pulses through you like a drum, and you uphold your deity's wrath with a bloody fist. Choose a deity. You gain the edicts and anathema of your chosen deity. While raging, you can increase the additional damage from Rage from 2 to 3 and change its damage type to spirit, instead of the damage type for your weapon or unarmed attack. This spirit damage has no effect on creatures devout to your deity or protected by your deity. You gain the initial domain spell for one of your deity’s domains which has the rage trait for you. If a domain spell you gained can be Sustained, the Sustain action gains the rage trait for that spell. You start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point and your domain spells are divine spells. You are trained in spell attack modifiers and spell DCs. Your spellcasting ability is Charisma.

If you perform enough acts that are anathema to your deity, you lose the abilities that come from your connection to your deity. The class features that you lose are determined by the GM, but they likely include your ability to deal spirit damage with Godsent Rage and your domain spells. These abilities if can be regained only you repent by conducting an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.7Fd4lxozd11MQ55N]{Atone} ritual.

Specialization Ability (7th) Increase the additional damage from Rage from 3 to 7. If you have greater raging specialization, instead increase the damage from Rage to 13.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist spirit damage and mental damage.

Bolstered by the Ancestor.name: 受祖先鼓舞 Bolstered by the Ancestor
Bolstered by the Ancestor.description:
你祖先的记忆涌入你的脑海，带来诸多教训。当你首次获得此专长时，选择一项你已受训的技能。你在狂暴时成为所选技能的专家。若你在所选技能上已是专家且至少为7级，则你改为在所选技能上成为大师；若你在所选技能上已是大师且至少为15级，则你成为传奇。若你在所选技能上已是传奇，则你改为在狂暴时对所选技能获得+2状态加值。

FoundryVTT Note 一旦你达到将获得+2状态加值的阶段，应用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.2PS5FBTBWnWhBbJp]{Effect: Bolstered by the Ancestor}。

Memories of your ancestor flood your mind with lessons. When you first gain this feat, choose a skill in which you are trained. You become an expert in the chosen skill when you Rage. If you are an expert in the skill you chose and are at least 7th level, you instead become a master in the chosen skill, and if you are a master in the skill you chose and are at least 15th level, you become legendary. If you are legendary in the chosen skill, you instead gain a +2 status bonus to the chosen skill while raging.

FoundryVTT Note Apply @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.2PS5FBTBWnWhBbJp]{Effect: Bolstered by the Ancestor} once you reach the point you'd gain the +2 status bonus.

Monster Rider.name: 怪物骑手 Monster Rider
Monster Rider.description:
通过在激烈的战斗中与怪物摔跤，你可以控制它们。尝试对触及范围内一只大型或更大的异怪、动物、野兽或龙进行[[/act grapple]]。如果你成功，目标必须立刻进行一次@Check[type:will|against:athletics]豁免，对抗你的运动DC。若失败，你立刻@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.PM5jvValFkbFH3TV]{Mount}该生物，并且它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}状态，由你作为控制者，直到你的下次每日准备。该生物可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次意志豁免以结束被控制（状态），但严重失败其豁免的生物只有在你给出一个违背其天性的新的命令时才会获得一次新的豁免，例如杀死其盟友（由GM酌情决定）。如果某生物在你骑乘其上时结束其被控制（状态），你会被迫进入一个与该生物相邻的方格，并被击倒为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

By wrestling with monsters in the heat of combat, you can control them. Attempt to [[/act grapple]] an aberration, animal, beast, or dragon within reach that is Large or larger. If you succeed, the target must immediately make a @Check[type:will|against:athletics] save against your Athletics DC. On a failure, you immediately @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.PM5jvValFkbFH3TV]{Mount} the creature and it gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} condition with you as the controller until your next daily preparations.
