The creature can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns to end the controlled condition, but creatures that critically failed their save only receive a new save if you give it a new order that is against its nature, such as killing its allies (subject to GM discretion). If a creature ends its controlled condition while you are mounted, you are forced into a square adjacent to the creature and are knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Musical.name: 音乐的 Musical
Musical.description:
你通过失真的乐器、尖啸的嗓音与强烈的节拍来表达你的怒火。你不会获得“Quick Tempered”自由动作（）。你从野蛮人（职业）获得的训练技能改为表演而非运动，并且在狂暴时，用于表演（Perform）的表演检定获得狂暴（特征）。当你在战斗中进行表演（Perform）时，若你的结果超过30尺内一名敌人的意志DC，你将获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{振奋}状态，持续至你下个回合结束。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.TEjn4bZZQ9JGAM08]{狂怒噪响}行动。

振奋加值 你获得临时生命值，并且你的表演检定与DC获得+1环境加值。

You express your fury through distorted instruments, shrieking vocals and emphatic beats. You do not gain the Quick Tempered free action. You’re trained in Performance instead of Athletics from the barbarian class and Performance checks to Perform gain the rage trait while raging. When you Perform in combat, if your result exceeds the Will DC of an enemy within 30 feet, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated} until the end of your next turn. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.TEjn4bZZQ9JGAM08]{Furious Cacophony} activity.

Invigoration Bonus You gain temporary Hit Points and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your Performance checks and DCs.

Body Bludgeon.name: 躯体钝击 Body Bludgeon
Body Bludgeon.description:
触发 你在一次擒抱检定中大成功。

需求 你有一个敌人处于被擒抱或被束缚状态，且你的另一只手空闲。

你的力量强大到可以轻易将他人当作武器使用。你用你已擒抱或束缚的生物进行一次打击，并且在你完成这次额外的打击之前，你不会因触发动作而承受多重攻击减值。这次打击被视为一次双手徒手攻击；若目标体型为小型或更小，其伤害骰为d8；若为中型，则为d10；若为大型或更大，则为d12。作为需求的敌人受到等同于你的力量调整值加上你的武器专精伤害再加上你的狂暴伤害的钝击伤害，然后失去作为需求的状态。

Trigger You critically succeed at a Grapple check.

Requirements You have a foe grabbed or restrained and your other hand is free.

Your strength is so great that you can easily use others as weapons. You make a Strike with the creature you have grabbed or restrained and you do not apply your multiple attack penalty from the triggering action until after you complete this additional Strike. This is considered a two-handed unarmed attack, with a damage die of d8 if the target is size Small or smaller, d10 if they are Medium, and d12 if they are Large or larger. The required foe takes bludgeoning damage equal to your Strength modifier plus your weapon specialization damage plus your Rage damage and then loses the required condition.

Instinct Crown (Wrecker).name: 本能王冠（破坏者） Instinct Crown (Wrecker)
Instinct Crown (Wrecker).description:
本能王冠是一种被注入野蛮人在战斗中汲取之本能精髓的魔法头饰。每顶王冠都会被塑造成与其所绑定的本能相符的形象，例如动物本能王冠会是狼首造型，或巨人本能王冠会是一顶刻有约顿符文的简易头盔。佩戴时，王冠让你能更进一步触及你的本能；若王冠的精髓与你的本能相匹配，你将获得更强的增益。你必须能够狂暴才能使用王冠的启用能力。

启用 F 想象

频率 每日1次

触发 你掷骰先攻

效果 你狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启用 2 命令、想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每日1次

效果 摧毁战争机器。你以近战打击进行的攻击对构装体时，无视等同于你等级的物理抗力。当你以打击对一个生物重击成功，且该生物符合你从狂暴获得强化伤害的条件时，该目标必须尝试一次对抗你职业DC的强韧豁免，否则其将陷入迟缓1，持续1轮。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect Destroy warmachines. Your melee Strikes ignore physical resistance equal to your level against constructs. When you critically succeed at a Strike against a creature that would qualify for your heightened damage from Rage, that target must attempt a Fortitude save against your Class DC or it becomes slowed 1 for 1 round.

Euphoric.name: 欣快 Euphoric
Euphoric.description:
战斗的热潮中，欢笑与愉悦令你充满力量。你不会获得“Quick Tempered”自由动作（）。当你在一次Strike中大成功，或你Step进入敌人的触及范围内时，你会变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated}，直到你下一个回合结束。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.mdkKy5VLFxCFgFMk]{Giddy Step} 自由动作（）。

振奋加值 你获得临时生命值，并在对抗情绪效果的豁免检定上获得+1状态加值。

Glee and laughter fills you with power in the heat of battle. You do not gain the Quick Tempered free action. When you critically succeed at a Strike or you Step within reach of an enemy, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated} until the end of your next turn. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.mdkKy5VLFxCFgFMk]{Giddy Step} free action.

Invigoration Bonus You gain temporary Hit Points and a +1 status bonus to saves against emotion effects.

Reckless Rage.name: 鲁莽狂暴 Reckless Rage
Reckless Rage.description:
你以鲁莽的狂怒过度透支自己，使你从凡人变为怒火的化身。

你进行狂暴，具有以下额外效果：

  • 你获得对你的野蛮人（职业）职业DC的+2状态加值。

  • 你的豁免检定和AC承受–1减值。

  • 你将狂暴抗力提供的抗力翻倍。

  • 你在结束狂暴后1小时内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}。

特殊 如果你拥有血怒者或狂野血脉本能，你改为获得对你的法术攻击调整与法术DC的+2状态加值，而非对你的野蛮人（职业）职业DC的+2状态加值。

You overexert yourself with a reckless rage that changes you from person to avatar of fury.

You Rage with the following additional effects:

  • You gain a +2 status bonus to your barbarian class DC.

  • You take a –1 penalty to saving throws and AC.

  • You double your resistance from raging resistance.

  • You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 1 hour after you finish raging.

Special If you have the bloodrager or wildblood instincts, you gain a +2 status bonus to your spell attack modifier and spell DCs instead of to your barbarian class DC.

Furious Maneuvers.name: 狂怒战技 Furious Maneuvers
Furious Maneuvers.description:
你的动物伙伴的动作是你狂暴的强大支点。你的动物伙伴的高等动作获得狂暴（特征）。当你的动物伙伴使用其高等动作时，你在下一次对受你伙伴动作影响的生物，或处于你伙伴触及范围内的生物进行打击时，每个武器伤害骰额外造成 1 点伤害。若你伙伴的高等动作不造成伤害或不包含打击，则你每个武器伤害骰改为额外造成 2 点伤害。

Your animal companion’s maneuvers are powerful leverage for your rage. Your animal companion’s advanced maneuver gains the rage trait. When your animal companion uses its advanced maneuver, you deal 1 additional damage per weapon damage dice on the next Strike against creatures that were affected by your companion’s maneuver or that is within your companion’s reach. If your companion’s advanced maneuver does not deal damage or include a Strike, you deal 2 additional damage per weapon damage dice instead.

Shield Rush.name: 盾击冲锋 Shield Rush
Shield Rush.description:
需求 你正持用一面盾牌。

你朝一名对手冲锋，举盾在前，准备将其痛殴。你进行一次疾走、举起盾牌，然后使用盾击或一把附着在你盾牌上的武器进行一次打击。

Requirements You are wielding a shield.

You charge towards an opponent, shield raised and ready to bludgeon them. You Stride, Raise a Shield, and then make a Strike with a shield bash or a weapon attached to your shield.

Tumultuous Anatomy.name: 动荡解剖学 Tumultuous Anatomy
Tumultuous Anatomy.description:
你的解剖结构变得更加不自然，会不断扭曲自身以应对针对你的攻击。掷骰一次 @Check[dc:11|type:flat]。若成功，则触发的大成功不会造成双倍伤害。

Your anatomy has grown even more unnatural, constantly warping itself in response to attacks against you. Roll a @Check[dc:11|type:flat]. On a success, a triggering critical hit does not deal double damage.

Instinct Crown (Decay).name: 本能王冠（腐朽） Instinct Crown (Decay)
Instinct Crown (Decay).description:
本能王冠是一种灌注了野蛮人在战斗中汲取之本能精髓的魔法头饰。每顶王冠都会被制成与其所绑定的本能相符的样式，例如动物本能王冠会做成狼头，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的简易头盔。佩戴时，王冠让你能更进一步触及自身本能；若王冠的精髓与你的本能相符，你将获得更大的增益。你必须能够狂暴才能使用王冠的启用能力。

启用 F 想象

频率 每日一次

触发 你掷骰先攻

效果 你狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启用 2 命令，想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每日一次

效果 你为周遭之人带来腐朽。当你在你的回合结束时受到腐烂狂暴的伤害时，与你相邻的敌人也会受到你腐烂狂暴的伤害，但伤害类型改为与你的腐烂狂暴所造成的伤害相同的伤害类型。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect You bring decay to those around you. When you take damage from rotting rage at the end of your turn, enemies adjacent to you also take the damage of your rotting rage, except the damage type is the same damage as the damage from your rotting rage.

Ruthless.name: 无情 Ruthless
Ruthless.description:
你并非陷入压倒性的愤怒，而是放下所有情感，进入一种经过计算且令人胆寒的状态；在此期间，你的所有愤怒都由残酷的逻辑而非情绪所引导。你不会获得 Quick Tempered 自由动作（）。当你在狂暴时进行搜寻，你的察觉检定获得+1环境加值。当你在狂暴时尝试以你曾尝试搜寻过的一名生物为目标进行一次打击时，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated} 状态，持续至你下个回合结束。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.VHdPKyJJRHwSnrgO]{Cold Judgement} 动作。

激励加值 你获得临时生命值，且你对察觉检定的环境加值提升至+2。

Rather than an overwhelming anger, you drop all emotions to enter a calculated and terrifying state during which all of your anger is led by a cruel logic rather than emotion. You do not gain the Quick Tempered free action. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to Seek while raging. When you attempt a Strike against a creature you attempted to Seek while raging, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated} until the end of your next turn. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.VHdPKyJJRHwSnrgO]{Cold Judgement} action.

Invigoration Bonus You gain temporary Hit Points and your circumstance bonus to Perception checks increases to +2.

Instinct Crown (Rune).name: 本能王冠（符文） Instinct Crown (Rune)
Instinct Crown (Rune).description:
本能王冠是一种魔法头饰，灌注了野蛮人在战斗中汲取的本能精华。每顶王冠都会被塑造成与其所系的本能相符的形象，例如动物本能王冠会做成狼头，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的简朴头盔。佩戴时，王冠让你能更深入地触及自身本能；若王冠的精华与你的本能相匹配，你将获得更强大的益处。你必须能够进入狂暴才能使用王冠的启用。

启用 F 想象

频率 每天一次

触发 你掷骰先攻

效果 你进入狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启用 2 命令、想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每天一次

效果 你将符文与自己的武器建立连结。选择一个你等级或更低的常见属性符文，且该符文在合理情况下可应用于你正持用的一把武器。只要你处于狂暴状态，该武器便获得该属性符文，且该符文不计入你的武器可拥有的属性符文总数。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect You bond your runes to your weapons. Choose a common property rune of your level or lower that you could reasonably apply to a weapon you are wielding. That weapon gains that property rune as long as you are raging and does not count towards the total number of property runes your weapon can have.

Ligneous Instinct (Alternate).name: 木质本能（替代） Ligneous Instinct (Alternate)
Ligneous Instinct (Alternate).description:
狂风呼啸，大地震颤，一棵树依然稳固挺立，根深而坚实。向袭来的力量屈服便意味着死亡，因此那伟岸的大树坚守原地，高耸而威严——你也将如此。

本能能力——木质狂暴 当你处于狂暴时，你可以将狂暴带来的额外伤害从2提高到4，并获得+1 AC状态加值。若你这么做，你的速度减少10英尺，因为覆盖你身体的树皮板甲会妨碍机动性。此速度减值无法以任何方式被克服，不过可以被速度提升所抵消。

专精能力（7级）当你使用木质狂暴时，将狂暴带来的额外伤害从4提高到8。若你拥有高等武器专精，改为将你在使用木质狂暴时狂暴带来的伤害从8提高到16。

狂暴抗力（9级）你对穿刺与钝击伤害获得抗力，但你获得等同于3 + 你的体质调整值的火焰弱点，因为你那类似树皮的血肉高度易燃。

As winds howl, as the earth shakes, a tree stands firm, rooted and solid in itself. To give in to the forces that assault it is to die, so the mighty tree stays where it is, towering and imposing—and you shall do the same.

Instinct Ability—Wooden Rage While raging, you can increase the additional damage from Rage from 2 to 4, and gain a +1 status bonus to your AC. If you do this, reduce your Speed by 10 feet, as the bark plates covering your body are a hindrance to mobility. This speed reduction can’t be overcome by any means, though it can be offset by speed increases.

Specialization Ability (7th) When you use wooden rage, increase the additional damage from Rage from 4 to 8. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the damage from Rage when using wooden rage from 8 to 16.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist piercing and bludgeoning damage, but you gain weakness to fire equal to 3 + your Constitution modifier, as your bark-like flesh is highly flammable.

MORE! MOOOORE!.name: 更多！更——多——！ MORE! MOOOORE!
MORE! MOOOORE!.description:
触发 你将一名敌人的生命值降至0。

在击倒一个敌人后，你任由嗜血欲望引导你寻找下一个猎物。你向你能看见的一名敌人以你的速度进行疾走。

Trigger You reduce an enemy to 0 Hit Points.

After striking down a foe, you let your bloodlust guide you to your next kill. You Stride up to your speed towards an enemy you can see.

Horrific Display.name: 骇人展示 Horrific Display
Horrific Display.description:
你的血肉在一阵内脏般的可怖爆发中展露无遗。30英尺内的每个敌人都要受到你的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.f0GvS1PVZEHnCcTr]{狂怒解剖}影响，仿佛他们就是触发生物。无论他们的豁免结果如何，此后每个生物都会对恐怖展现获得1分钟的暂时免疫。

Your flesh exhibits itself in a burst of visceral gruesomeness. Each enemy within 30 feet is subject to your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.f0GvS1PVZEHnCcTr]{Furious Anatomy} as if they were the triggering creature. Regardless of the results of their saves, each creature is then temporarily immune to Horrific Display for 1 minute.

Instinct Crown (Breach).name: 本能冠冕（突破） Instinct Crown (Breach)
Instinct Crown (Breach).description:
本能王冠是一种注入野蛮人在战斗中汲取之本能精髓的魔法头饰。每顶王冠都会被塑造成代表其所绑定本能的样式，例如动物本能王冠可能做成狼头，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的简易头盔。佩戴时，王冠让你能更深入地汲取本能；若王冠的精髓与你的本能相符，则会赋予你更大的好处。你必须能够狂暴才能使用王冠的启用。

启用 F 想象

频率 每日一次

触发 你掷骰先攻

效果 你进入狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启用 2 命令、想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相符

频率 每日一次

效果 你巩固你与所指定位面的联结，在行进路线中留下该位面的痕迹。当你疾行时，你会在自己的路径上留下持续1分钟的困难地形；而你通过破界重击所制造的困难地形会持续到你停止狂暴为止。当你处于你所创造的困难地形的区域内时，你的近战打击造成额外2点伤害。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect You solidify your union with your designated plane, leaving trails of the plane in your path. When you Stride, you leave difficult terrain in your path that lasts for 1 minute and difficult terrain created by your Breach Blow lasts until you stop raging. While in an area of difficult terrain you created, you deal 2 additional damage with your melee Strikes.

Fury Instinct (Alternate).name: 狂怒本能（变体） Fury Instinct (Alternate)
Fury Instinct (Alternate).description:
你引导的是最纯粹的愤怒——毫无过滤、原始而吞噬一切。你的狂暴超越其他野蛮人，赢得部分人的敬畏，也令他人心生恐惧。

本能能力—狂乱狂暴随着战斗持续，你的狂暴变得越来越尖锐。当你使用带有狂暴（特征）的动作时，你会短暂进入狂乱状态，使你更危险，但也让你更容易受到攻击。你将狂暴带来的额外伤害从2提高到6，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}直到你下个回合开始。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.nzWQSM585O3arVtW]{狂怒疾行}动作。

专精能力（7级）狂暴带来的额外伤害提高到6。你在狂乱状态下的额外伤害提高到10。若你拥有高等武器专精，则改为将狂暴的额外伤害提高到12，狂乱状态伤害提高到18。

狂暴抗力（9级）你对物理武器伤害具有抗力，但不对来自其他来源的物理伤害具有抗力（例如徒手攻击）。

You channel anger in its purest form, unfiltered, raw, and all-consuming. Your rage transcends that of other barbarians, earning the respect of some and the fear of others.

Instinct Ability—Frenzied Rage Your rage becomes more and more acute as combat continues. When you use an action with the Rage trait, you briefly enter a frenzied state, making you more dangerous but leaving you open to attack. You increase your additional damage from Rage from 2 to 6 and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the start of your next turn. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.nzWQSM585O3arVtW]{Furious Stride} action.

Specialization Ability (7th) The additional damage from Rage increases to 6. The additional damage from your frenzied state increases to 10. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the additional damage from Rage to 12, the frenzied state damage increases to 18.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist physical weapon damage, but not physical damage from other sources (such as unarmed attacks).

Phrenic Blood.name: 膈神经血统 Phrenic Blood
Phrenic Blood.description:
你的血液随着深呼吸流动，抚慰你的感官与心灵。你受到等同于你等级一半的 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。你在本次狂暴期间第一次因该效果而受到持续流血伤害时，你可以立即尝试反制你当前正承受的一项心灵效果，在该检定中使用你的法术DC - 10 作为反制调整值，并以你能施放的最高环阶法术作为反制环阶。

Your blood flows with a deep breath, soothing your senses and mind. You take @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,bleed]] damage equal to half your level. The first time during your current rage that you take persistent bleed damage from this effect, you can immediately attempt to counteract a mental effect you are currently suffering from, using your spell DC - 10 as the counteract modifier for the check and the highest rank spell you can cast as the counteract rank.

Believer's Form.name: 信徒形态 Believer's Form
Believer's Form.description:
你的神祇赐福于你，使你获得真正信徒的形态。你的法术攻击调整值与法术DC的熟练度等级提升至大师。每小时一次，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.MMCQsh12TPaDdPbV]{Sacred Form} 作为天生神圣法术施放，其环阶等于你等级的一半（向上取整），且该法术具有狂暴（特征）。在该形态下，若你自身的AC与攻击调整值更高，你可以改用你自己的，并且你将来自狂暴的额外伤害加到你的打击上。

Your deity blesses you with the form of a true believer. Your proficiency rank for spell attack modifiers and spell DCs increases to master. Once per hour, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.MMCQsh12TPaDdPbV]{Sacred Form} as an innate divine spell with a rank equal to half your level rounded up and the spell has the rage trait. You can use your own AC and attack modifier while in this form if it is higher and you apply your additional damage from Rage to your Strikes.

Death Tornado.name: 死亡龙卷风 Death Tornado
Death Tornado.description:
你成为一台螺旋般的死亡机器。你先进行一步移动（Step），随后你近战触及内的生物会受到一次近战打击（Strike）的伤害，并针对你的职业DC进行一次@Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:class]豁免。每个回合中，只要你用此能力将一个生物的生命值降至0，你就可以继续使用此动作；但你第一次使用此动作未能将敌人的生命值降至0时，你的狂暴会立刻结束，并且你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}10分钟。

You become a spiraling death machine. You Step and then creatures within your melee reach take the damage of a melee Strike with a @Check[basic:true|type:reflex|against:class] save against your class DC. You can continue to use this action each turn you reduce a creature to 0 Hit Points with this ability, but the first time you do not reduce an enemy to 0 Hit Points from using this action your Rage immediately ends and you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 10 minutes.

Summon Runic Guardian.name: 召唤符文守卫 Summon Runic Guardian
Summon Runic Guardian.description:
伴随着一声咆哮，你的符文从身体上抽离并塑形，形成由纹身构成的强大动物。你拥有一名符文守护者，它以纹身形式栖居在你的身体上，并可在狂暴期间被召唤。当处于纹身形态时，符文守护者不受区域效果影响，且必须被单独指定为目标才能影响它，而这需要知晓它是一个生物。这意味着你和你的盟友可以治疗或协助符文守护者，而大多数敌人仍未察觉其真实本质。生物必须尝试一次[[/act seek dc=20]]{DC 20 察觉检定}来进行搜索，以意识到该纹身实际上是一个生物（而很少有敌人会这么做）。

作为一个具有狂暴（特征）与召唤（特征）的3-行动行动，你可以产生@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{召唤动物}的效果，并将其升阶至等于你等级一半（向上取整）的环阶，且该效果可维持至多1分钟。你用于维持该效果的维持行动具有狂暴（特征）。当你将要停止狂暴或该效果将要结束时，你的符文守护者会以纹身形式返回你的身体；若它之后再次被召唤，它会保留任何已失去的生命值或它本应遭受的状态。

With a roar, your runes pull from your body and shape to form mighty animals made from your tattoos. You have a runic guardian which resides on your body as a tattoo and can be summoned during a rage. While in tattoo form, runic guardian isn't affected by area effects and must be targeted separately to affect it, which requires knowledge that it's a creature. This means you and your allies can heal or assist the runic guardian while most enemies stay unaware of its true nature. Creatures must attempt a [[/act seek dc=20]]{DC 20 Perception check} to Seek to realize the tattoo is actually a creature (which few foes will try).

As a 3-action activity with the rage and summon traits, you can produce the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{Summon Animal}, heightened to a rank equal to half your level rounded up that can be sustained up to 1 minute. Your Sustain action to maintain the effect has the rage trait. When you would stop raging or this effect would end, your runic guardian returns to your body as a tattoo and it keeps any lost Hit Points or conditions it would have suffered if it is summoned again.

Whirling.name: 旋转 Whirling
Whirling.description:
你的狂暴并非笨拙之举，而是席卷般的毁灭。在持用非灵巧武器时，你无法使用你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.a9PzINjFTO5GvAJN]{Quick Tempered} 自由动作（）。你从野蛮人（职业）获得的训练技能为特技（Acrobatics）而非运动（Athletics），并且在狂暴时，你在对抗敌人 DC 的特技（Acrobatics）检定中获得 +1 环境加值。你从狂暴获得的额外伤害在使用非灵巧武器时减半。当你在对抗敌人 DC 的特技（Acrobatics）检定中成功时，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated} 状态，持续至你下个回合结束。你获得“旋风突进（Whirling Advance）”动作。

振奋加值（Invigoration Bonus） 你获得临时生命值，你的特技（Acrobatics）检定的环境加值提高至 +2，并且在使用灵巧武器时，你不会将来自狂暴的额外伤害减半。

Your rage is not a clumsy endeavor, but one of whirling devastation. You cannot use your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.a9PzINjFTO5GvAJN]{Quick Tempered} free action while wielding a non-agile weapon. You are trained in Acrobatics instead of Athletics from the barbarian class and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks against enemy DCs while raging. Your additional damage from Rage is halved with non-agile weapons. When you succeed at an Acrobatics check against an enemy DC, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated} until the end of your next turn. You gain the Whirling Advance action.

Invigoration Bonus You gain temporary Hit Points, your circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks increases to +2, and you do not halve your additional damage from rage with agile weapons.

Wildblood Instinct.name: 狂血本能 Wildblood Instinct
Wildblood Instinct.description:
发光的血管、咬紧的牙关与令人胆寒的异界力量——在魔法与武力交织的世界中，没有任何战士能像蛮血者那样踏行。对他们而言，愤怒不只是情绪——那是一种超自然的状态，能将古老而深邃的法术通过他们的血脉引导出来。蛮血者的魔法如其肉体武勇一般迅疾、暴烈，且仿佛不可阻挡。你必须选择 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.XjEDGnPBEW5XCxjR]{Wildblood Dedication} 作为你的2级职业专长。

先决条件：你必须是一名野蛮人（职业）。

蛮血者调整值：你从野蛮人（职业）的等级中获得10点生命值再加上你的体质调整值，而非通常数值。你不再从野蛮人（职业）所列选项中选择本能，而是拥有蛮血者本能。

若你施放法术，你的近战打击会在你下一回合结束前造成额外的狂暴伤害，且你的额外伤害的伤害类型会改变为与该法术的伤害相同（若该法术造成伤害）。若该法术造成多种伤害类型，则在结算该法术的伤害时，你选择你的打击获得哪一种伤害类型。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.SBYWCgB16XQVuPau]{Effect: Wildblood Infusion}

本能能力——怒焰魔法选择一个术士血脉。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.P74V0HWxgNTV4u82]{Wildblood Spellcasting}，且你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{Rage} 获得你所选血脉之根源的特征。你在近战打击上不再因狂暴造成额外伤害；改为对你以法术位施放、或从此变体的专长获得、且具有狂暴（特征）的造成伤害的法术，施加你来自狂暴的额外伤害。这仅适用于该法术在施放时造成的初始伤害。

专精能力（7级）当你狂暴时，将来自狂暴的额外伤害从2提高至4。若你拥有高等武器专精，则改为将伤害从4提高至8。

狂暴抗力（9级）你对挥砍伤害具有抗力，并且对你从自身血脉之魔法根源所施放的法术所受到的所有伤害具有抗力，无论该法术造成何种伤害类型。

额外专长： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.A7ofsoPva0UtjqrX]{Cantrip Expansion}（4级），@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.lG4dYrnkE42IgnGG]{Energy Ward}（8级），@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.zf6Poru1jNmrO3kk]{Bloodline Resistance}（10级），@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.AXy4A7zTYk1JAiOV]{Magic Sense}（14级）

With glowing veins, grit teeth and frightening otherworldly powers, no warrior treads the worlds of magic and might quite like the wildbloods do. To them, fury isn't just an emotion—it's a supernatural state that channels old and deep spells through their blood. The wildblood’s magic is as fast, violent, and seemingly unstoppable as their physical prowess. You must select @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.XjEDGnPBEW5XCxjR]{Wildblood Dedication} as your 2nd-rank class feat.

Prerequisites: You must be a barbarian.

Wildblood Adjustments: You gain 10 Hit Points plus your Constitution modifier from your levels in the barbarian class instead of the normal amount. Instead of choosing an instinct from the options listed in the barbarian class, you have the wildblood instinct.

If you Cast a Spell, your melee Strikes deal your additional rage damage until the end of your next turn and the damage type of your additional damage changes to be the same as the damage of the spell if the spell dealt damage. If the spell deals more than one type of damage, you choose which damage type your Strikes gain when the spell’s damage is resolved.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.SBYWCgB16XQVuPau]{Effect: Wildblood Infusion}

Instinct Ability—Fury Magic Choose a sorcerer bloodline. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.P74V0HWxgNTV4u82]{Wildblood Spellcasting} and your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Ah5g9pDwWF9b9VW9]{Rage} gains the trait of the tradition of your selected bloodline. You do not deal additional damage with Rage on your melee Strikes, but instead deal your additional damage from Rage on damage dealing spells with the rage trait that you cast from spell slots or that you gained from feats from this archetype. This applies only to the initial damage the spell deals when cast.

Specialization Ability (7th) When you rage, increase the additional damage from Rage from 2 to 4. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the damage from 4 to 8.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist slashing damage and against all damage you take from spells cast from your bloodline’s tradition of magic, regardless of the type of damage dealt by the spell.

Additional Feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.A7ofsoPva0UtjqrX]{Cantrip Expansion} (4th), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.lG4dYrnkE42IgnGG]{Energy Ward} (8th), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.zf6Poru1jNmrO3kk]{Bloodline Resistance} (10th), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.AXy4A7zTYk1JAiOV]{Magic Sense} (14th)

Disaster Follows.name: 灾害追随 Disaster Follows
Disaster Follows.description:
需求 你没有倒地或无法移动。

你的灾害迫使你以狂野而危险的模式移动。在你进入此架势后，你的每个回合结束时，你以强迫移动的方式向你选择的方向移动10英尺。如果你在此次移动期间将会接触到一个生物或障碍物，你可以尝试在此次强迫移动中作为其中一部分对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}，或对障碍物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{强行打开}。如果由于任何原因你未能至少移动10英尺，你会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

Requirements You are not prone or immobilized.

Your disaster forces you to move with wild and dangerous patterns. At the end of each of your turns after you enter this stance, you move 10 feet in a direction of your choice as forced movement. If you would contact a creature or barrier during this movement, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} the creature or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open} a barrier as part of this forced movement. If you fail to move at least 10 feet for any reason, you fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Mouthsword.name: 口剑 Mouthsword
Mouthsword.description:
这把剑由佩戴者通过剑柄上用于紧咬下颚的嵌入装置来挥舞，使使用者仅用嘴就能持用它，而无需占用自己的一只手。以这种方式持用武器时，你无法采取带有语言（特征）的动作，并且你在进行带有听觉（特征）的攻击掷骰、DC或技能检定时承受–4环境减值。如果你同时持用三把口剑，你将双生特征提供的伤害环境加值提高1。

This sword is wielded by the wearer using a jaw-clench inset on the hilt of the blade, allowing the user to wield it with only their mouth and without occupying one of their hands. While wielding a weapon in this way, you cannot take actions with the linguistic trait and you take a –4 circumstance penalty to attack rolls, DCs, or skill checks with the auditory trait. If you are wielding three mouthswords, you increase the circumstance bonus to damage from the twin trait by 1.

Ultraviolent Retaliation.name: 极端暴力报复 Ultraviolent Retaliation
Ultraviolent Retaliation.description:
需求 你正处于一场遭遇中，并且有一个敌人使一名盟友获得了濒死（状态）。

你冲向那个伤害你朋友的对手，并对其释放出如此骇人且迅捷的残暴打击，以至于他们可能只会剩下一滩内脏。向所需的敌人进行一次 Stride，然后对该生物进行一次 Strike。若你的 Strike 成功，则除你的 Strike 的正常效果外，该敌人还必须尝试一次对抗你职业DC的 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class] 豁免。若你的 Strike 是重击，则目标将其成功等级视为降低一级。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失（状态） 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失（状态） 2}。如果作为你的 Strike 或流失（状态）的结果，你的 Strike 的目标的生命值降至 0，则其立即死亡。

大成功或大失败 失败 同失败，但目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失（状态） 4}，并且必须额外尝试一次对抗你职业DC的豁免，否则其立即死亡。这是一个无力化效果。

Requirements You are in an encounter with an enemy that gave an ally the dying condition.

You charge forward at the opponent who harmed your friend and unleash such frightening and swift brutality against them that they may be left as nothing more than a puddle of viscera. Make a Stride towards the required enemy and then Strike that creature. If your Strike is successful, the enemy must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class] save against your class DC in addition to the normal effects of your Strike. If your Strike was a critical hit, the target treats their degree of success as one worse.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}. If the target of your Strike is reduced to 0 Hit Points as a result of your Strike or the drained condition, it dies instantly.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 4} and must attempt an additional save against your class DC or it dies instantly. This is an incapacitation effect.

Wildblood Dedication.name: 野血奉献 Wildblood Dedication
Wildblood Dedication.description:
你已学会通过深入挖掘血脉之力，将力量激涌贯穿于你的血液之中。除了你的其他戏法之外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.hiqoZc3SW8BAuTOO]{血之激涌} 血脉戏法。

You have learned to surge your power through your blood by digging deep for your bloodline’s power. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.hiqoZc3SW8BAuTOO]{Blood Surge} bloodline cantrip in addition to your other cantrips.

Greater Gifts of The Blood.name: 血之高等赋礼 Greater Gifts of The Blood
Greater Gifts of The Blood.description:
随着你的血脉愈发强盛，由其果实孕育出更伟大的赋礼。你获得一个4环法术位，并学会与你的血脉相关联的4环法术。在14级时，你获得一个5环法术位，并学会与你的血脉相关联的5环法术。在16级时，你获得一个6环法术位，并学会与你的血脉相关联的6环法术。你只能使用这些法术位来施放通过此专长授予你的法术。

As your blood strengthens, greater gifts are born of its fruit. You gain a 4th-rank spell slot and learn the 4th-rank spell associated with your bloodline. At 14th level, you gain a 5th-rank spell slot and learn the 5th-rank spell associated with your bloodline. At 16th level, you gain a 6th-rank spell slot and learn the 6th-rank spell associated with your bloodline. You can only use these spell slots to cast spells granted to you from this feat.

Dragon Instinct (Alternate).name: 巨龙本能（替代） Dragon Instinct (Alternate)
Dragon Instinct (Alternate).description:
你召唤强大巨龙的怒火，并显现出不可思议的能力。也许你的文化崇敬龙族的威严，或者你通过饮用或沐浴龙血、或目睹一条劫掠的巨龙焚毁你的村庄而获得了洞见。从“龙之本能”表中选择一种龙作为你本能的龙类型。这些龙出自《怪物核心》，但你的 GM 可能允许你从其他来源选择龙，并决定其根源与龙息类型。

本能能力—龙之狂暴 当你处于狂暴时，你可以将狂暴提供的额外伤害从 2 提升至 3；或者若你将其伤害类型从你的武器或徒手攻击的伤害类型改为与你本能的龙息相同的伤害类型，则可将额外伤害从 2 提升至 4。若你这么做，你的狂暴动作获得与你龙之本能的根源相匹配的特征，并在适用时获得与该伤害类型相匹配的特征。

专精能力（7级） 当你使用龙之狂暴时，你将狂暴提供的额外伤害从 3 提升至 7；或者若你将其伤害类型改为与你本能的龙息相同的伤害类型，则从 4 提升至 8。若你拥有高等武器专精，则改为将狂暴的伤害从 7 提升至 13，或在使用龙之狂暴时从 8 提升至 16。

狂暴抗力（9级） 你获得对穿刺伤害以及你本能的龙息伤害类型的抗力。

龙之本能

龙根源龙息
精金原初钝击
阴谋家秘法毒素
魔狱神圣火焰
天界神圣灵魂
命运奥术力场
角龙原初毒素
幻景奥术心灵
凶兆秘法心灵
黑龙奥术酸蚀线
蓝龙奥术电击线
绿龙奥术毒素锥形
红龙奥术火焰锥形
白龙奥术寒冷锥形
黄铜龙奥术火焰线
青铜龙奥术电击线
赤铜龙奥术酸蚀线
金龙奥术火焰锥形
银龙奥术寒冷锥形
森林原初钝击
海洋奥术钝击
天空神圣电击
主权秘法心灵
冥界奥术火焰
盐卤原初酸蚀
水晶原初穿刺
云原初电击
岩浆原初火焰
幽影秘法虚无（对抗不死生物时为力场）

You summon the fury of a mighty dragon and manifest incredible abilities. Perhaps your culture reveres draconic majesty, or you gained insights by drinking or bathing in dragon's blood or watching a marauding wyrm burn your village. Select a type of dragon from the Dragon Instincts table as your instinct's dragon type. These are the dragons from Monster Core, but your GM might allow you to choose dragons from other sources and determine their tradition and dragon breath type.

Instinct Ability—Draconic Rage While raging, you can increase the additional damage from Rage from 2 to 3 or from 2 to 4 if you change its damage type to match that of your instinct’s dragon breath instead of the damage type for your weapon or unarmed attack. If you do this, your Rage action gains the trait matching your dragon instinct’s tradition, as well as the trait matching the damage type where applicable.

Specialization Ability (7th) When you use draconic rage, you increase the additional damage from Rage from 3 to 7, or from 4 to 8 if you change its damage type to match that of your instinct’s dragon breath. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the damage from Rage from 7 to 13 or when using draconic rage from 8 to 16.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist piercing damage and the damage type of your instinct's dragon breath.

Dragon Instincts

DragonTraditionDragon Breath
AdamantinePrimalBludgeoning
ConspiratorOccultPoison
DiabolicDivineFire
EmpyrealDivineSpirit
FortuneArcaneForce
HornedPrimalPoison
MirageArcaneMental
OmenOccultMental
BlackArcaneLine of Acid
BlueArcaneLine of Electricity
GreenArcaneCone of Poison
RedArcaneCone of Fire
WhiteArcaneCone of Cold
BrassArcaneLine of Fire
BronzeArcaneLine of Electricity
CopperArcaneLine of Acid
GoldArcaneCone of Fire
SilverArcaneCone of Cold
ForestPrimalBludgeoning
SeaArcaneBludgeoning
SkyDivineElectricity
SovereignOccultMental
UnderworldArcaneFire
BrinePrimalAcid
CrystalPrimalPiercing
CloudPrimalElectricity
MagmaPrimalFire
UmbralOccultVoid (force against undead)

Instinct Crown (Elemental).name: 本能冠冕（元素） Instinct Crown (Elemental)
Instinct Crown (Elemental).description:
本能冠冕是一种注入了野蛮人在战斗中汲取之本能精粹的魔法头饰。每一顶冠冕都会被制作成与其所绑定的本能相符的样式，例如动物本能冠冕会做成狼头造型，而巨人本能冠冕则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的简易头盔。佩戴时，冠冕能让你更深入地触及自身本能；如果冠冕的精粹与你的本能相匹配，你将获得更强的增益。你必须能够狂暴才能使用冠冕的启用能力。

启用 F 观想

频率 每日一次

触发 你掷骰先攻

效果 你狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启用 2 命令，观想

需求 冠冕的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每日一次

效果 你能轻松号令元素。你在狂暴结束前获得加速。你可以用你的额外动作来使用带有冲动特征的动作或活动。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect You can call on the elements with ease. You become quickened until the end of your rage. You can use your extra action to use actions or activities with the impulse trait.

Grip Needle.name: 握针 Grip Needle
Grip Needle.description:
由于其极其微小的体型，这把极其微小的刀刃需要极大的力量才能正确挥舞，而不是像匕首那样依赖通常的灵巧需求。

This immensely tiny blade requires intense strength to wield properly instead of the normal dextrous requirements of a knife due to its miniscule size.

Call the Breach.name: 呼唤裂隙 Call the Breach
Call the Breach.description:
你从通往裂隙的传送门本身引出能量并显现其本质。你在一个持续1分钟的@Template[distance:30|type:emanation]中制造困难地形，并根据你所选择的位面产生不同的效果。此能力获得与你的位面相关联的特征。

位面

效果

星界

梦境与火焰的强烈气息在你的涌发中蓬勃滋长。生物的幻影出现在该区域内，为你与盟友提供夹击，如同它们是能够对你的敌人进行攻击的生物一般。

以太界

以太的短暂本质扎根于此。涌发内的生物获得10尺飞行速度、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，并获得等同于你等级的物理伤害抗力，除非该伤害将由带有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{幽灵接触}属性的武器或徒手攻击造成。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.DowZBFFAGGpiXTC7]{效果：召唤以太裂隙}

幽冥界

旋卷的阴影自彼方升起。该区域变为昏暗光照；若原本已经是昏暗光照，则变为黑暗。你立刻熄灭任何非魔法光源，并尝试反制魔法光源。你此次尝试的反制阶位等于你等级的一半（向上取整），且你在反制检定中使用你的职业DC - 10。在此黑暗中处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态时，以你为目标所需进行的纯骰检定为7而非5。

第一世界

长老们那变幻的位面确实桀骜不驯，而你能唤起其汹涌本性。你可以花费一个单动作，并带有专注与狂暴（特征）特征，在该区域内制造一个@Template[type:burst|distance:10]的强效困难地形，持续至持续时间结束。

You draw forth the energies of the portal to the breach themselves and manifest its nature. You create difficult terrain in a @Template[distance:30|type:emanation] that lasts 1 minute and produces an effect depending on your selected plane. This ability gains the traits associated with your plane.

Plane

Effect

Astral

The intensity of dreams and fire flourish within your emanation. Figments of creatures appear within the area, providing flanking for you and your allies as if they were creatures that could make attacks against your enemies.

Ethereal

The ephemeral natures of the ethereal take root. Creatures within the emanation gain a fly speed of 10 feet, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, and resistance to physical damage equal to your level unless the damage would be dealt by a weapon or unarmed attack with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} property. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.DowZBFFAGGpiXTC7]{Effect: Call the Ethereal Breach}

Netherworld

The swirling shadows arise from the beyond. The area becomes dim light or darkness if it would already be dim light. You immediately extinguish any non-magical light sources and attempt to counteract magical light sources. Your counteract rank for this attempt is equal to half your level rounded up, and you use your class DC - 10 for the counteract check. The flat check to target you while @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} in this darkness is 7 instead of 5.

First World

The shifting plane of the eldest is truly unruly, and you can call forth its tumultuous nature. You can spend a single action with the concentrate and rage traits to create a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] of greater difficult terrain within the area that lasts the duration.

Road Rage.name: 路怒 Road Rage
Road Rage.description:
当你坐在载具的方向盘后时，你最为愤怒。你获得用于驾驶学识（技能）的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 技能专长，并且当你处于狂暴状态时，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.uS3qDAgOkZ7b8ERL]{Drive} 动作对你获得狂暴（特征）。每当你在狂暴状态下驾驶载具时，你将你的狂暴伤害加到你的载具的撞击伤害上。若某个行动会要求你进行疾行（Stride），例如突然冲锋（Sudden Charge），你可以改为使用 Drive 来替代你本应使用于疾行（Stride）的相同数量的动作，并将任何对速度的限制或降低应用到你的载具的移动上。

You are at your angriest when behind the wheels of a vehicle. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} skill feat for Driving Lore, and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.uS3qDAgOkZ7b8ERL]{Drive} action gains the Rage trait for you while you are raging. Whenever you pilot a vehicle while raging, you add your Rage damage to your vehicle's collision damage. If an activity would call you to Stride, such as Sudden Charge, you can instead use Drive for a number of actions that you would have used Stride applying any restrictions or reductions in speed to your vehicle's movement.

Raging.name: 暴怒中 Raging
Raging.description:
你的狂暴体现为暴力且无法控制的愤怒。这不会对你现有的特性作出任何改动。

Your rage is exemplified in violent and uncontrollable anger. This makes no changes to your existing features.

Instinct Crown (Disaster).name: 本能冠冕（灾害） Instinct Crown (Disaster)
Instinct Crown (Disaster).description:
本能王冠是一种注入了野蛮人在战斗中汲取之本能精髓的魔法头饰。每顶王冠都会被塑造成其所关联的本能的象征，例如动物本能王冠可能是狼头造型，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的朴素头盔。佩戴时，王冠使你能够更深入地触及自身本能；若王冠的精髓与你的本能相符，你将获得更强的增益。你必须能够狂暴才能使用王冠的启用。

启用 F 想象

频率 每日1次

触发 你掷骰先攻

效果 你狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启用 2 命令，想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每日1次

效果 你作为末日的先兆带来灾害与毁灭。于你的灵光区域内结束其回合的生物，会受到与该灵光将造成的数值与类型相同的持续伤害。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect You bring disaster and ruin as the herald of the end. Creatures that end their turn within the area of your emanation take persistent damage of the same amount and type as the emanation would deal.

Revitalizing Blood.name: 活化血液 Revitalizing Blood
Revitalizing Blood.description:
你让自己流血以重振他人。你受到 @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,bleed]] 伤害，数值等于你等级的一半，并选择30英尺内的一名盟友。每当你受到此持续流血伤害时，你给予该盟友等同于上次数值的临时生命值，持续至你下个回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.saANGEZnZQX0FTn4]{效果：重振之血}

You bleed yourself to revitalize others. You take @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[persistent,bleed]] damage equal to half your level and choose one ally within 30 feet. Each time you take this persistent bleed damage, you grant your ally temporary Hit Points equal to the same amount that last until the beginning of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.saANGEZnZQX0FTn4]{Effect: Revitalizing Blood}

Heedless Swig.name: 鲁莽痛饮 Heedless Swig
Heedless Swig.description:
你在战斗正酣时抽出一个烧瓶、酒杯或小瓶，一饮而尽，然后将其随手丢开，精神为之一振。你以【交互】取出一份饮料或液体，然后再次以【交互】饮用你正持有的饮料或液体，并如常获得饮用该液体的效果。若该液体为摄入型毒药，你可以选择让自己的豁免检定自动失败，以获得持续2轮的+1状态加值至伤害，外加等同于该物品等级一半（向下取整）的轮数。以这种方式摄入毒药会使其效果失去潜伏期并立即对你生效。若你为7级，该状态加值至伤害提高为+2；若你为15级，则提高为+4。

You pull a flask, tankard or vial down in the middle of combat, down it, and throw it to the wayside, reinvigorated. You Interact to draw a drink or liquid and then Interact again to consume a drink or liquid you are holding, gaining its effects as normal for consuming the liquid. If the liquid was an ingested poison, you may choose to get an automatic failure on your saving throw to gain a +1 status bonus to damage for 2 rounds plus a number of rounds equal to half the level of the item. Consuming poisons in this way causes the effects to lose their onset period and affect you immediately. The status bonus to damage increases to +2 if you are 7th level, or +4 if you are 15th level.

Lashing Branches.name: 鞭笞树枝 Lashing Branches
Lashing Branches.description:
当你狂暴时，你的双手会变成扭动的木质藤蔓，使你能够从远处打击敌人。你获得一次鞭击枝条徒手打击，造成 1d6 挥砍伤害，并具有触及与多用 B 特征。若你拥有大成功或大失败专精，你的徒手攻击也获得推撞特征。

Your hands transform into twisting wooden tendrils when you rage, allowing you to strike at your enemies from afar. You gain a lashing branch unarmed strike, which deals 1d6 slashing damage and has the reach and versatile B traits. If you have critical specialization, your unarmed attack also gains the shove trait.

World-Shaking Throw.name: 撼动世界投掷 World-Shaking Throw
World-Shaking Throw.description:
你投掷物体的力量真正堪称泰坦之力。处于狂暴时，你将你的投掷武器的射程加倍。你使用投掷武器造成大成功或大失败时，目标必须尝试一次对抗你的职业DC的 @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classDC.value)] 豁免，否则被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

你可以用单次交互动作尝试使用你的运动学举起沉重物体，例如圆木或巨石。当你成功举起沉重物体时，它成为一把带有投掷特征的临时武器，射程为20尺。无论你用沉重物体进行打击的结果如何，该物体都会移动到其被投掷到的位置，并留在那里作为障碍物，将任何本会占据其新空间的生物移动到最近的相邻方格。沉重物体的伤害骰为d12，且其体型每高于中型一级便额外增加1个伤害骰。

你到底举不举？

任何超过10负载的物体都被视为沉重物体，而物体的体型通常决定其默认负载值：大型物体为12负载，超大型物体为24负载，巨型物体为48负载。密度不同的物体（例如实心岩石或中空树干）可能会提高或降低该负载值（由GM酌情决定），但举起沉重物体的运动学DC等于20加上超出你负载上限（10加上你的力量调整值）之上的负载值，并且你在继续持握该物体的每个回合都必须尝试一次新的运动学检定。

The force at which you throw things is truly titanic. While raging, you double the range of your thrown weapons. On a critical hit with a thrown weapon, the target must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classDC.value)] save against your class DC or be knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

You can attempt to lift heavy objects using your Athletics, such as logs or boulders, with a single Interact action. When you successfully lift a heavy object, it becomes an improvised weapon with the thrown trait and a range of 20 feet. Regardless of the result of a Strike made with a heavy object, the object moves to the location it was thrown and remains there as an obstacle, moving any creatures that would occupy its new space to the nearest adjacent square. The damage die for a heavy object is d12 and deals an additional damage die for each size above Medium.

DO YOU EVEN LIFT?

Any object greater than 10 Bulk is considered a heavy object and the size of the object generally determines its default bulk value with a Large object being 12 Bulk, a Huge object being 24 Bulk, Gargantuan object being 48 Bulk. Objects that have different densities, such as solid stone or a hollow tree, may increase or decrease this Bulk value (subject to GM discretion), but the Athletics DC to lift a heavy object is equal to 20 plus the Bulk value above your Bulk limit (10 plus your Strength modifier) and you must attempt a new Athletics check each turn you continue to hold the object.

Frenzied Mixer.name: 狂乱调酒师 Frenzied Mixer
Frenzied Mixer.description:
花费 1 个多用小瓶

你已学会在没有器具的情况下使用你的混合物。你制造一个你配方簿中、等级等于或低于你等级的炼金诱变剂，无需花费通常的炼金原材料金钱成本，也无需尝试一次制作检定，然后进行交互，将该诱变剂投掷给 20 英尺内的一名盟友。该物品具有灌注（特征）。

Cost 1 versatile vial

You have learned to use your mixtures without an apparatus. You create a single alchemical mutagen of your level or lower that’s in your formula book without having to spend the normal monetary cost in alchemical raw materials or needing to attempt a Crafting check and then Interact to throw the mutagen to an ally within 20 feet. This item has the infused trait.

Call of the Ancestor.name: 先祖的呼唤 Call of the Ancestor
Call of the Ancestor.description:
需求 你正持用你的遗珍。

你倾听你遗珍武器中祖先的呼唤。你专注于你的遗珍武器，并尝试通过进行一次对抗你等级的标准DC的 @Check[type:perception|dc:@self.level] 检定，以尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} 其声音。若你的检定为成功，你在本回合内用你的遗珍武器进行下一次攻击掷骰获得+1环境加值；若你的检定为大成功或大失败，则获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.NQvBAbJB8uUlmntt]{效果: 祖先的呼唤}

Requirements You’re wielding your vestige.

You listen for the call of the ancestor in your vestige weapon. You concentrate on your vestige weapon, and attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} for its voice by attempting a @Check[type:perception|dc:@self.level] check against a standard DC of your level. If your check is a success, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your next attack roll with your vestige weapon this turn, or a +2 circumstance bonus if your check was a critical success.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.NQvBAbJB8uUlmntt]{Effect: Call of the Ancestor}

Hulk-Pull Shot.name: 浩克式拉拽射击 Hulk-Pull Shot
Hulk-Pull Shot.description:
2 或 3

需求 你正持用一把弓组的武器。

你以前所未有的力量将弓弦向后拉满。用所需武器进行一次远程打击。此次打击除打击的正常效果外，还获得以下效果。

大成功 你在打击中造成来自狂暴的额外伤害，且目标被击退10英尺。若你使用了此行动的3行动版本，则当目标接触到屏障或物体时，在其接触屏障或物体后会被击倒为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{prone}。这是强迫移动。

成功 同大成功，但你只造成一半的狂暴伤害，且目标被击退5英尺。

大失败 你的弓获得破损（状态），直到你花费10分钟用修理行动重新为其上弦。

2 or 3

Requirements You’re wielding a weapon in the bow group.

You pull your bowstring back with unprecedented strength. Make a ranged Strike with the required weapon. The Strike gains the following effects in addition to the normal effects of a Strike.

Critical Success You deal your additional damage from Rage on your Strike and the target is knocked back 10 feet. If you used the 3-action version of this activity, if the target contacts a barrier or object, it is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{prone} after it contacts the barrier or object. This is forced movement.

Success As critical success, but you only deal half your Rage damage and the target is knocked back 5 feet.

Critical Failure Your bow gains the broken condition until you spend 10 minutes restringing it with the Repair action.

Harness Bloodline.name: 血脉驾驭 Harness Bloodline
Harness Bloodline.description:
你获得你的血脉的初始血脉法术。如果你还没有，你还会获得一个包含1聚能点的聚能池，你可以无需任何额外努力进行再聚能。

You gain your bloodline’s initial bloodline spell. If you don’t already have one, you also gain a focus pool of 1 Focus Point, which you can Refocus without any special effort.

Instinct Crown (Alchemical).name: 本能王冠（炼金） Instinct Crown (Alchemical)
Instinct Crown (Alchemical).description:
本能王冠是一种被灌注了野蛮人在战斗中汲取之本能精髓的魔法头饰。每顶王冠都会被制作成与其所系联的本能相符的样式，例如动物本能王冠可能是狼首造型，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的简易头盔。佩戴时，王冠让你能够更深入地触及自身本能；若王冠的精髓与你的本能相匹配，你将获得更强的增益。你必须能够狂暴（Rage）才能使用王冠的启用能力。

启用 F 构想

频率 每日一次

触发 你掷先攻

效果 你狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启用 2 命令，构想

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每日一次

效果 你的身体对炼金术的副作用产生抗性。只要你处于狂暴状态，你可以无视一项诱变剂的诱变性缺陷，并且你用诱变剂获得的攻击造成额外2点伤害。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect Your body becomes resistant to the drawbacks of alchemy. You can ignore one mutagenic drawback as long as you are raging and you deal 2 additional damage with attacks you gained from a mutagen.

Destined Kill.name: 天命杀戮 Destined Kill
Destined Kill.description:
有时，战士会立誓在单挑中击败一个孤身而耀眼的强敌。选择30英尺内的一个敌方生物作为你命中注定要杀死的敌人。你对所选敌人的攻击掷骰获得+1环境加值，并且你会被他们所 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{fascinated}。你对除该目标之外的生物进行攻击掷骰时承受–1环境减值。若你对除你命中注定要杀死的敌人的目标之外的生物采取敌对动作，你立刻结束你的架势，除非这些动作是为了与目标交战所必须，例如尝试从受擒状态中逃脱（由GM酌情决定）。

如果你将你命中注定要杀死的敌人降至0生命值，你的架势立刻结束，并获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续至你狂暴结束为止。若该生物的等级高于你，你还会在狂暴结束前获得+2状态加值于意志豁免。

Sometimes, a warrior is sworn to defeat a solitary and spectacular foe in single combat. Choose an enemy creature within 30 feet to become your destined kill. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls against the chosen enemy and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{fascinated} by them. You take a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against creatures other than the target. You immediately end your stance if you take hostile actions against creatures other than the target of your destined kill, unless they would be required to engage with your target, such as attempting to Escape from the grabbed condition (subject to GM discretion).

If you reduce your destined kill to 0 Hit Points your stance immediately ends and you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last for as long as you are raging. If the creature was above your level, you also gain a +2 status bonus to Will saves until your rage ends.

Walk With Spirits.name: 与灵同行 Walk With Spirits
Walk With Spirits.description:
你化为狂暴的灵体。你变为虚体，并获得等于你速度一半的飞行速度。当你选择将你的伤害改为灵魂伤害时，对实体生物的打击会如常影响实体生物，且你的狂暴抗力改为对所有伤害的抗力（除力场外）。这些效果持续至你的狂暴结束。

You become a raging spirit. You become incorporeal and gain a fly Speed equal to half your Speed. Strikes against corporeal creatures when you choose to change your damage to spirit damage affect corporeal creatures as normal and your raging resistance changes to be resistance to all damage (except force). These effects last until your rage ends.

Despairing.name: 绝望的 Despairing
Despairing.description:
你的狂热并非由愤怒驱动，而是由绝望驱动。也许你为自己过去的行为、现在的处境，甚至不得不施加如此暴力这一事实而感到极度悲伤！你不会获得“Quick Tempered”自由动作（）。当你在狂暴时受到伤害后，只要你没有因该伤害而获得濒死或失去意识（特征）状态，你便获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{振奋}，持续至你下一回合结束。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.fblNfvSAeKRoJHVD]{欢迎苦难} 动作。

振奋加值 你获得临时生命值，并在对抗听觉效果的豁免检定中获得 +1 状态加值。

Your fervor is not fueled by anger, but by despair. Perhaps you feel terrible sadness for your past actions, your present situation, or even the fact that you must commit such violence! You do not gain the Quick Tempered free action. After you take damage while raging, as long as you did not gain the dying or unconscious conditions from the damage, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated} until the end of your next turn. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.fblNfvSAeKRoJHVD]{Welcome Misery} action.

Invigoration Bonus You gain temporary Hit Points and a +1 status bonus to saves against auditory effects.

Absorb Power.name: 吸收力量 Absorb Power
Absorb Power.description:
触发 你因一个法术而受到伤害。

你吸收敌方法术的力量，借此强化你的攻击。你的近战打击在你下个回合结束前造成你额外的狂暴伤害，并且伤害类型变为与触发该法术的伤害相同的类型。如果该法术造成多于一种伤害类型，则在该法术的伤害结算时，你选择你的打击获得哪一种伤害类型。

Trigger You take damage from a spell.

You absorb the power of enemy spells, leveraging them to empower your attacks. Your melee Strikes deal your additional rage damage until the end of your next turn and the damage type changes to be the same as the damage of the triggering spell. If the spell deals more than one type of damage, you choose which damage type your Strikes gain when the spell’s damage is resolved.

Blood Surge.name: 鲜血涌动 Blood Surge
Blood Surge.description:
flourish

你以从自身血液中迸发的能量浪潮向前冲刺。你以能量爆裂，对区域内的生物造成1d4力场伤害，且你必须将自己包含在该区域内，但你将自己在豁免上的成功等级视为提高一级。你如同正常施放法术一般，结算来自你的血之狂怒的额外伤害。若你当前的近战打击已被你的血之狂怒强化，你可以选择将此法术的伤害类型改为与你打击上的额外伤害相同的伤害类型。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

flourish

You surge forth with a burst of energy, exuded from your own blood. You explode with energy that deals 1d4 force damage to creatures in the area and you must include yourself in the area, but you treat your degree of success on your save as one step better. You deal your additional damage from your blood rage as normal for casting a spell. If your melee Strikes are currently empowered by your blood rage, you can choose to change the damage type of this spell to be the same damage type as the additional damage on your Strikes.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

We Ride!.name: 我们上马！ We Ride!
We Ride!.description:
需求 你的动物伙伴拥有坐骑特殊能力，且正处于狂暴。

你生来就要与伙伴一同狂暴并骑乘，并能流畅地做到这一点。你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.q9nbyIF0PEBqMtYe]{Command} 你的动物伙伴，使其向你方向疾行并采取其支援动作。若你的动物伙伴的疾行在移动过程中穿过你触及范围内的一个方格，你可以花费你的反应动作（）来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.PM5jvValFkbFH3TV]{Mount} 你的动物伙伴，使你在它移动期间进入该方格时骑上它。

Requirements Your animal companion has the mount special ability and is raging.

You were born to rage and ride with your companion and do so fluidly. You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.q9nbyIF0PEBqMtYe]{Command} your animal companion to Stride toward you and take its support action. If your animal companion’s Stride moves through a square within your reach, you may spend your reaction to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.PM5jvValFkbFH3TV]{Mount} your animal companion as it enters the square during its movement.

Explosive Blood.name: 爆炸血液 Explosive Blood
Explosive Blood.description:
你在手中引导起强大的力量，并将其释放为一场灾难性的爆裂。如果你的下一个动作是施放一个会获得来自狂暴的额外伤害且也会对你造成伤害的法术，那么直到你下一个回合结束前，你将来自狂暴的额外伤害加倍。此伤害提升适用于你的近战打击以及你施放的法术，包括你用此动作调整的那个法术。

You channel up mighty power in your hand, and release it in a cataclysmic blast. If your next action is to Cast a Spell that would deal the additional damage from Rage and would also damage you, you double the additional damage from Rage until the end of your next turn. This increase in damage applies to your melee Strikes and spells you cast, including the spell you modified with this action.

Instinct Crown (Zealot).name: 本能王冠（狂热者） Instinct Crown (Zealot)
Instinct Crown (Zealot).description:
本能王冠是一种魔法头饰，灌注了野蛮人在战斗中汲取的本能精粹。每顶王冠都会被制作成代表其所绑定本能的样式，例如动物本能王冠会做成狼头，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的简朴头盔。佩戴时，王冠让你能更进一步触及自身本能；若王冠的精粹与你的本能相符，你将获得更强的增益。你必须能够狂暴才能使用王冠的启动。

启动 F 想象

频率 每天一次

触发 你掷骰先攻

效果 你进入狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启动 2 命令，想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相符

频率 每天一次

效果 你高声祈祷，呼唤你的神祇回应你的召唤。在此次狂暴期间，你将所有敌人都视为你的神祇之敌。在你的狂暴期间有一次机会，当你对一名生物进行攻击掷骰，且该生物在正常情况下符合“你的神祇之敌”的条件时，你可以掷骰两次并取较好的结果。这是一个幸运效果。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect You call upon your god to answer your call in a shouted prayer. You treat all enemies during this rage as if they were enemies of your deity. Once during your Rage, when you make an attack roll against a creature that would normally qualify as an enemy of your deity you can roll twice and take the better result. This is a fortune effect.

Raging Support.name: 狂暴支援 Raging Support
Raging Support.description:
需求 你的动物伙伴正处于狂暴。

你的动物伙伴的支援由狂暴驱动。当你的动物伙伴采取支援动作时，你的狂暴所提供的额外伤害提高1点。若你至少为7级，则改为将你的狂暴所提供的额外伤害提高2点；若你拥有强效武器专精，则提高4点。

Requirements Your animal companion is raging.

Your animal companion’s support is fueled by rage. When your animal companion takes the support action, the additional damage from your rage is increased by 1. If you are at least 7th level, instead increase the additional damage from your rage by 2, or by 4 if you have greater weapon specialization.

Language of the Beasts.name: 野兽语言 Language of the Beasts
Language of the Beasts.description:
暴力是所有生物都会说的语言，而你对此驾轻就熟。你可以通过肢体语言、哼声、咆哮或其他方式，与不会说任何语言的活体生物交流。虽然你无法传达确切的词句或细节，但你能从它们那里了解一些基础信息，甚至可以如同你们共享一种语言般对它们进行欺骗、交涉或威吓检定，但只能传达简单的情绪。尽管这未必能阻止它们采取敌对动作（如果它们原本就打算如此），通常情况下，非敌对的生物会给你一些时代让你陈述理由。

Violence is the language all creatures speak, and you are fluent in it. You can communicate with living creatures that do not speak a language through body language, grunts, roars, or other methods. Though you cannot communicate exact words or details, you can learn rudimentary information from them and even make Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation checks against them as if you shared a language but only simple emotions can be conveyed. Though it might not stop them from taking hostile actions if they already intended to, non-hostile creatures will generally give you time to make your case.

Obstinate.name: 顽固的 Obstinate
Obstinate.description:
你的移动僵硬而缓慢，你的决心坚定而凶猛。你不会获得“Quick Tempered”自由动作（）。你在狂暴时，对抗强迫移动或会使你获得倒地（状态）的效果的豁免与DC获得+1环境加值。若你在狂暴时于你的回合内移动不超过30英尺，你会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated}直到你下个回合结束。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.pi9t13IlpY1UohRc]{Stand Firm}动作。

激励加值 你获得临时生命值，且你对抗强迫移动与倒地（状态）的豁免与DC的环境加值提升至+2。

Your movements are rigid and slow, your resolve firm and ferocious. You do not gain the Quick Tempered free action. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saves and DCs against forced movement or effects that would give you the prone condition while raging. If you did not move more than 30 feet during your turn while raging, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.xVAGPe1NX6QEwQ7O]{invigorated} until the end of your next turn. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.Item.pi9t13IlpY1UohRc]{Stand Firm} action.

Invigoration Bonus You gain temporary Hit Points and your circumstance bonus to saves and DCs against forced movement and the prone condition increases to +2.

Warped Bloodsurge.name: 扭曲血涌 Warped Bloodsurge
Warped Bloodsurge.description:
你已经学会将你释放的魔法爆发改变成不同的形状。当你施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.hiqoZc3SW8BAuTOO]{Blood Surge} 时，你可以将区域改为 @Template[distance:15|type:cone] 或 @Template[distance:30|type:line]，而不是以你为中心的放射。你仍会如同身处该区域中一样承受血涌的伤害。

You've learned to alter the eruptions of magic that you release into different shapes. When you cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.hiqoZc3SW8BAuTOO]{Blood Surge}, you can change the area into a @Template[distance:15|type:cone] or a @Template[distance:30|type:line] instead of an emanation centered on you. You still take damage from blood surge as if you were in the area.

Carve the World.name: 雕刻世界 Carve the World
Carve the World.description:
触发 你将对一次打击判定获得大成功。

你的攻击如此强大，以至于在一场战斗结束时，你可能已经用永不磨灭的伤痕永久雕刻了战场，并将因此名垂史册。河流因你剑刃一斩而生，深渊因铁锤一挥而成，或山口被你掷出的标枪劈出一道山谷；你那不可思议的壮举，将在你身后长存于你雕刻世界的方式之中。

当你将对一个生物或一个物体造成重击时，你可以选择粉碎你周围的战场。你的打击获得死亡（特征），并在正常效果之外，依据你的武器造成的伤害类型获得以下效果。你也可以基于其他武器伤害造成不影响战场的其他电影化效果，例如一枚火焰属性符文在一瞬间永久烧尽森林中所有树叶，或一枚电击属性符文把海滩的沙子变成玻璃。

钝击 你在攻击落点制造深坑。以你的打击的目标为中心，深坑出现在一个@Template[distance:30|type:burst]范围内，使区域内所有生物坠落至该爆发边缘的落差，并承受相应的坠落伤害。你与触发本能力的打击之目标不承受此坠落伤害。在该区域内，向中心以外的任何方向移动都视为困难地形。

穿刺 你在最不可能的区域中贯穿出隧道与步道。你摧毁一个包含目标、并从你方格边缘开始的@Template[distance:60|type:line]内的所有障碍与自然地形特征。该区域变为困难地形，且占据该区域的生物会被自动移动到该区域外最近的空间。这是强迫移动。

挥砍 你劈裂战场上所有直立的障碍物。你会伤害一个@Template[distance:45|type:cone]内所有高于你方格的障碍物，并造成等同于触发打击之武器伤害两倍的挥砍伤害。该伤害无视任何硬度。若这将摧毁该物体，则它改为看起来毫发无伤，直到你下个回合结束；随后它会坍塌，并在其所在区域与周围方格制造更强的困难地形。

Trigger You would critically succeed at a Strike.

Your attacks are so mighty that by the end of a battle, you might have permanently carved the battlefield with scars that will go down in legend. The birth of a river from the slash of your sword, the creation of a chasm by the swing of a hammer, or a valley being carved through a mountain pass by the hurl of your javelin; your impossible deeds will live long after you in the way you carve the world.

When you would critically hit a creature or an object, you may choose to sunder the battlefield around you. Your Strike gains the death trait and the following effects in addition to the normal effects, based on the kind of damage your weapon deals. You may do other cinematic effects that do not affect the battlefield based on other weapon damage, such as a flaming property rune permanently burning up all the leaves from a forest in an instant, or a shocking property rune turning a beach's sand to glass.

Bludgeoning You create deep craters where your attack lands. The crater appears out to a @Template[distance:30|type:burst] with the target of your Strike as the center, causing all creatures in the area to fall the distance to the edge of the burst and take falling damage as appropriate. You and the target of the triggering Strike do not take this falling damage. Traveling in any direction other than towards the center while in the area is considered difficult terrain.

Piercing You pierce tunnels and walkways through the most impossible of areas. You destroy all obstacles and natural features within a @Template[distance:60|type:line] that includes the target and starts from an edge of your square. This area becomes difficult terrain and creatures occupying the area are automatically moved to the nearest space outside of the area. This is forced movement.

Slashing You carve all standing obstacles in the battlefield. You damage all obstacles taller than your square in a @Template[distance:45|type:cone] and deal slashing damage equal to twice the triggering Strikes weapon damage. This damage ignores any hardness. If this would destroy the object, it instead appears unharmed until the end of your next turn, after which it collapses and creates greater difficult terrain in its area and surrounding squares.

Instinct Crown (Vestige).name: 本能王冠（遗珍） Instinct Crown (Vestige)
Instinct Crown (Vestige).description:
本能王冠是一种注入了野蛮人在战斗中汲取的本能精华的魔法头饰。每一顶王冠都会被制作成与其所绑定的本能相对应的形象，例如动物本能王冠会做成狼头，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有尤顿符文的朴素头盔。佩戴时，王冠让你能更进一步挖掘自身本能；若王冠的精华与你的本能相匹配，你将获得更强的增益。你必须能够狂暴才能使用王冠的启用。

启用 F 想象

频率 每日一次

触发 你掷骰先攻

效果 你进入狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启用 2 口令、想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每日一次

效果 你获得祖先之力。你比以往更充分地呈现出祖先的形态，并在此过程中提升你的体能与心智。你在豁免上获得+2状态加值。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect You have the power of your ancestor. You take on the form of your ancestor more fully than before, increasing your physical and mental prowess in the process. You gain a +2 status bonus to saves.

Instinct Crown (Ligneous).name: 本能王冠（木质） Instinct Crown (Ligneous)
Instinct Crown (Ligneous).description:
本能王冠是一种注入了野蛮人在战斗中汲取的本能精髓的魔法头饰。每顶王冠都会被制作成体现其所绑定本能的样式，例如动物本能王冠会做成狼首，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的简朴头盔。佩戴时，王冠能让你更深入地触及自身本能；若王冠的精髓与你的本能相符，你将获得更强大的增益。你必须能够进入暴怒才能使用王冠的启用。

启用 F 想象

频率 每日一次

触发 你掷先攻

效果 你进入暴怒，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启用 2 命令、想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每日一次

效果 你的皮肤如同快速生长的植物般愈合伤口。你获得等同于你等级一半的快速治疗。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect Your skin heals wounds as though it were a fast growing plant. You gain fast healing equal to half your level.

Furious Outburst.name: 狂怒爆发 Furious Outburst
Furious Outburst.description:
触发 你或一名盟友在一次会改变某个生物态度的交涉检定中失败。

你失去耐心并对另一个生物厉声呵斥，用直白而清晰的方式吼出你的表达。进行一次 @Check[type:intimidation] 检定，对抗与触发检定相同的DC，并在决定结果时以你的威吓结果取代触发检定的结果。如果在触发检定结算前该生物的态度为冷漠或更好，将该检定的DC降低2。

Trigger You or an ally fail a Diplomacy check that would change a creature's attitude.

You lose your patience and snap at another creature, bellowing out your communication bluntly and clearly. Attempt a check using @Check[type:intimidation] against the same DC as the triggering check, and you use your result on Intimidation instead of the triggering check for the purposes of determining the outcome. Decrease the DC of the check by 2 if the creature’s attitude is Indifferent or better before the triggering check is resolved.

Lingering Clarity.name: 余韵明晰 Lingering Clarity
Lingering Clarity.description:
你的清明渗透过你的情绪状态，使你能够应对一些更棘手的任务。你使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.vRXPsMbyuvoPvbAQ]{清明时刻} 并获得其效果，持续时间为你保持狂暴期间。当你启用一件物品或施放一个法术时，若其具有专注（特征）且不具有狂暴（特征），你在完成该动作或行动后立即结束你的架势。

Your clarity percolates through your emotional state, allowing you to tap into some of your more difficult tasks. You use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.vRXPsMbyuvoPvbAQ]{Moment of Clarity} and gain the effects for as long as you remain raging. When you Activate an Item or Cast a Spell, if it has the concentrate trait and lacks the rage trait you immediately end your stance after you complete the action or activity.

Decay Strike.name: 腐朽打击 Decay Strike
Decay Strike.description:
你将侵蚀你身体的腐朽引导至强力一击之中。进行一次打击，使用一种因你的狂暴而会造成额外毒素伤害的攻击。

大成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}。

成功 同大成功，但该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}。

You channel the decay that ravages your body into a powerful blow. Make a Strike with an attack that would deal additional poison damage from your Rage.

Critical Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Success As critical success, except the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Invigorating Speech.name: 振奋演说 Invigorating Speech
Invigorating Speech.description:
你站在盟友面前，提醒他们为何而战。你花费1分钟发表一篇振奋人心的演讲，在战斗前将你信念的一部分传递给至多100个生物。针对你演讲所影响的最高等级生物的标准DC进行一次 @Check[type:intimidation] 检定。不论结果如何，目标生物在1天内会暂时免疫你的振奋演讲。

大成功或大失败 你的演讲点燃了他们未曾察觉的热情。该生物立即恢复35生命值。若该生物在接下来1小时内进入一场与你演讲内容相关的遭遇，它获得15点临时生命值，以及对抗死亡与恐惧效果的豁免获得+2状态加值，持续1分钟。

成功 你的话语点燃了他们心中的火焰。同大成功或大失败，但该生物恢复20生命值并获得10点临时生命值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.XfvfGuGuvwpKIrco]{效果: 振奋演讲}

You stand before your allies and remind them why they fight. You spend 1 minute giving up to 100 creatures an emotionally charging speech that gives them a fraction of your conviction before battle. Make an @Check[type:intimidation] check against a standard DC for the highest level creature targeted by your speech. Regardless of the result, targeted creatures are temporarily immune to your Invigorating Speech for 1 day.

Critical Success Your speech ignites a fervor in them that they did not know was there. The creatures immediately recover 35 Hit Points. If the creature enters an encounter in the next hour related to your speech, it gains 15 temporary Hit Points and a +2 status bonus to saves against death and fear effects that last for 1 minute.

Success Your words stoke a flame in their hearts. As critical success, except the creature recovers 20 Hit Points and gains 10 temporary Hit Points.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.XfvfGuGuvwpKIrco]{Effect: Invigorating Speech}

Furious Domain.name: 狂怒领域 Furious Domain
Furious Domain.description:
你的狂暴与侍奉已被神祇认可，你也因此获得奖赏。你从与你初始领域法术相同的领域中获得该领域的进阶领域法术，且它获得狂暴（特征）。你在法术攻击掷骰与法术DC上成为专家。

Your rage and servitude has been recognized by the gods, and you have been rewarded. You gain the advanced domain spell from the same domain you selected for your initial domain spell and it gains the rage trait. You become an expert in spell attack rolls and spell DCs.

Hazardous Rift.name: 危险裂隙 Hazardous Rift
Hazardous Rift.description:
你可以召来与你的位面相关的能量，使其在你的幻象中显现。结束其回合时仍位于你由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.WByBCNNAEk7x2apk]{Breach Blow} 创造的困难地形中的生物，会以你的职业DC进行一次 @Check[basic:true|type:will|against:classDC] 意志豁免，并承受等同于你狂暴的额外伤害的伤害。你的有害地形的伤害类型由你选择心灵伤害或灵魂伤害。

You can invoke the energies associated with your plane to come forth in your illusions. Creatures that end their turn inside the difficult terrain created by your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.WByBCNNAEk7x2apk]{Breach Blow} take damage equal to your additional damage from Rage with a @Check[basic:true|type:will|against:classDC] save against your class DC. The damage type for your hazardous terrain is your choice of mental or spirit damage.

Alchemical Instinct.name: 炼金直觉 Alchemical Instinct
Alchemical Instinct.description:
你使用奇异的化学调配物，将你的愤怒强化成难以想象的狂怒。你可能是个温顺的科学家，把诱变剂当作宣泄最暴烈冲动的出口；也可能你本就已是令人震撼的巨汉，再通过炼金混合物把力量更推向极致。

本能能力—诱变狂暴 无论是吸入怪异的烟雾，还是用管子将试剂直接注入血液，当你狂暴时都会经历可怕的变化。你免费获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.is3Oz9wt11lNq62K]{炼金制造}技能专长以及一本空白的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.qCEOZ6109Yo34tRx]{配方簿}。你起始拥有一本标准配方簿，其中除了从炼金制造获得的配方外，还包含你所选择的两种常见1环炼金诱变剂的配方。每当你获得一个等级时，你学会1个你能够制造的任意等级物品的常见炼金诱变剂配方。在你的每日准备期间，你可以制造数量等于2+你的智力调整值的多用小瓶。

你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.a9PzINjFTO5GvAJN]{快速暴怒} 自由动作（）除了其初始触发外，还可以在遭遇的第1轮中因饮用诱变剂而被触发。当你处于诱变剂的效果之下时，你从狂暴获得的额外伤害从2提升至3，并且你额外获得等于你所饮用诱变剂物品等级一半的临时生命值，这些临时生命值是在你从狂暴获得的临时生命值之外额外获得的。若你饮用的诱变剂会使你的攻击掷骰获得减值，你便无法进入狂暴；而饮用会造成此类减值的诱变剂会立刻结束你的狂暴。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.i0Urwze7pbBPVx3X]{疯狂科学} 动作，以及一套固定在你身体上、协助你饮用诱变剂的特殊装置。你的装置重1负载并且可穿戴。你可以花费1分钟穿戴你的装置。你最多可以在装置中储存3个多用小瓶，并且你可以花费1分钟将其中的各种成分隔离，从而把一个多用小瓶储存在装置中。

专精能力（7级） 当你使用诱变狂暴时，你从狂暴获得的额外伤害从3提升至7，并将你能在装置中储存的诱变剂数量提升至4。若你拥有高等武器专精，则改为将诱变狂暴的伤害提升至13；在不处于诱变剂效果之下时为7，并将你能在装置中储存的诱变剂数量提升至5。

狂暴抗力（9级） 你抵抗电击与火焰伤害。

You use strange chemical concoctions to enhance your anger into an unimaginable fury. You might be a meek scientist who uses mutagens as an outlet for your most violent impulses, or you might be an already impressive hulk that takes your powers a step further through alchemical admixtures.

Instinct Ability—Mutagenic Rage Whether through breathing in bizarre fumes or pipes ainjecting reagents directly into your blood, you undergo terrible change when you rage. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.is3Oz9wt11lNq62K]{Alchemical Crafting} skill feat and a blank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.qCEOZ6109Yo34tRx]{formula book} for free. You start with a standard formula book, which contains the formulas for two common 1st-rank alchemical mutagens of your choice, in addition to the formulas gained from Alchemical Crafting. Each time you gain a level, you learn the formula for one common alchemical mutagen of any level of item you can create. During your daily preparations, you can create a number of versatile vials equal to 2 plus your Intelligence modifier.

Your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.a9PzINjFTO5GvAJN]{Quick-Tempered} free action can be triggered by consuming a mutagen during the first round of an encounter in addition to its initial trigger. While under the effects of a mutagen, your additional damage from rage increases from 2 to 3, and you gain additional temporary Hit Points equal to half the item level of the mutagen you consumed in addition to the temporary Hit Points you gained from Rage. You cannot enter a Rage if you consume a mutagen that would give you a penalty to attack rolls and consuming a mutagen that does so immediately ends your Rage.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.i0Urwze7pbBPVx3X]{Mad Science} action and a special apparatus you affix to your body that aids you in mutagen consumption. Your apparatus weighs 1 Bulk and can be worn. You can spend 1 minute to don your apparatus. You can store up to 3 versatile vials in your apparatus and can store a versatile vial in your apparatus by spending 1 minute isolating the various components of the mixture inside it.

Specialization Ability (7th) When you use mutagenic rage, you increase the additional damage from Rage from 3 to 7 and increase the number of mutagens you can store in your apparatus to 4. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the damage from Mutagenic Rage to 13 and to 7 while not under the effects of a mutagen and increase the number of mutagens you can store in your apparatus to 5.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist electricity and fire damage.

Take ‘Em All On.name: 把他们全都接下 Take ‘Em All On
Take ‘Em All On.description:
你不会被数量庞大的敌群所震慑，而是深入战斗的核心，以成群消灭敌人。你因狂暴获得的额外伤害会触发对区域伤害的弱点，并且当蜂群或部队对你造成伤害时，你获得狂暴时的抗力；若你本来就能抗他们造成的伤害，则你的狂暴抗力提高5。

You are not intimidated by vast hordes of opponents, delving into the depths of combat to destroy your enemies en masse. Your additional damage from Rage triggers weaknesses to area damage and you gain your raging resistance against damage dealt to you by swarms or troops or increase your raging resistance by 5 if you would already resist the damage they deal.

Instinct Crown (Bloodrager).name: 本能王冠（血怒者） Instinct Crown (Bloodrager)
Instinct Crown (Bloodrager).description:
本能王冠是一种灌注了野蛮人在战斗中汲取之本能精粹的魔法头饰。每顶王冠都会被制作成能代表其所系本能的样式，例如动物本能王冠可能做成狼头，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的简易头盔。佩戴时，王冠让你能够更进一步地触及自己的本能；若王冠的精粹与你的本能相符，你将获得更强的增益。你必须能够狂暴才能使用王冠的启用。

启用 F 想象

频率 每日一次

触发 你掷骰进行先攻

效果 你狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启用 2 命令、想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每日一次

效果 你与魔法的连结被推至极限。在你的狂暴结束前，你获得加速。你可以将该额外动作用于你因“收割鲜血”而获得的动作。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect Your connection to magic is pushed to its limits. You become quickened until the end of your rage. You can use your extra action for the action you gained to Harvest Blood.

Heartened.name: 振奋 Heartened
Heartened.description:
你的决心让你有力量超越安全的界限，去拯救你所关心的人。你不会获得“Quick Tempered”自由动作（）。你从野蛮人（职业）获得的受训技能不是 Athletics，而是 Diplomacy，并且在狂暴时，你的 Diplomacy 检定获得 +1 环境加值。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} 反应动作（）时，你可以选择通过说话鼓励的话语，掷骰 [[/act aid statistic=diplomacy traits=linguistic]]{Diplomacy} 来代替正常的技能检定，使你的 Aid 获得语言（特征）。

当你在遭遇中成功进行一次会使盟友受益的 Diplomacy 检定时，你会振奋，持续至你下个回合结束。你将振奋所提供的临时生命值授予被你该次 Diplomacy 检定影响的盟友，而非授予你自己；这些临时生命值会在你保持振奋的期间持续。如果你将临时生命值授予一名盟友，你此前授予上一名盟友的任何临时生命值会立刻失去。你获得 Bolster Hope 自由动作（）。

振奋加值 你给予受影响的盟友临时生命值，并且你对抗恐惧效果的豁免获得 +2 状态加值。如果当前遭遇中的任何盟友获得濒死（状态），你不再振奋，你们二者都会失去这些效果。

Your determination empowers you to go beyond what is safe to save those you care about. You do not gain the Quick Tempered free action. You’re trained in Diplomacy instead of Athletics from the barbarian class and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks while raging. When you use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} reaction, you can choose to roll [[/act aid statistic=diplomacy traits=linguistic]]{Diplomacy} instead of the normal skill check by speaking encouraging words, giving your Aid the linguistic trait.

When you succeed at a Diplomacy check that would benefit an ally in an encounter, you become invigorated until the end of your next turn. You grant the ally you affected with your Diplomacy check the temporary Hit Points of your invigoration instead of yourself that last for as long as you are invigorated. If you grant temporary Hit Points to an ally, any temporary Hit Points you granted to a previous ally are immediately lost. You gain the Bolster Hope free action.

Invigoration Bonus You grant the affected ally temporary Hit Points and you gain a +2 status bonus to saves against fear effects. If any ally in the current encounter gains the dying condition, you are no longer invigorated and you both lose these effects.

Elemental Instinct (Alternate).name: 元素本能（变体） Elemental Instinct (Alternate)
Elemental Instinct (Alternate).description:
当一些元素生物围绕着拥有此本能者时，另一些则发现，他们能更好地专注于自身力量之门，从而轻松终结冲突。

此野蛮人本能选项允许你引导元素力量，与单一元素及其相关位面建立连结。也许你的祖先是元素召唤师，或曾受元素领主祝福。从“元素本能”表中选择一种元素作为你本能的元素。若你的元素提供多种伤害类型，在选择该元素时，从中选定一种类型。

元素特征伤害
气气电击或挥砍
土土钝击或穿刺
火火火焰
金属金属穿刺或挥砍
水水钝击或寒冷
木木钝击或穿刺

本能能力——元素狂暴 当你狂暴时，你将狂暴带来的额外伤害从2提高至3，并将其伤害类型改为你为所选元素选定的类型。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.CbfszeYw3cf99kdv]{操能师献身}多职专长作为奖励专长，即使你不满足其等级先决条件。若你拥有任何与所选本能元素类型相同的操能师脉冲（例如通过选择操能师献身多职专长获得的那些），它们获得狂暴（特征），且当你用于维持这些脉冲时，“维持”动作获得狂暴（特征）。

特殊 你可以将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.6tDIVv2gafdO6GV4]{穿越之门}操能师变体专长作为2级变体专长选择。

专精能力 当你使用元素狂暴时，你将狂暴的伤害从3提高至7。若你拥有高等武器专精，则改为在使用元素狂暴时将狂暴的伤害从7提高至13。

狂暴抗力 你对所选元素的元素生物之攻击与能力所造成的伤害具有抗力，也对由你的元素构成的生物之攻击与能力所造成的伤害具有抗力，且不论伤害类型为何。你也对带有你元素特征的攻击、法术与能力所造成的伤害具有抗力。

While some elementals surround those with the instinct, others find they can better focus on their inner gates of strength for ending conflicts with ease.
