This instinct option for barbarians allows you to channel elemental forces, bonding with a single element and its associated plane. Perhaps your ancestors were elemental conjurers or blessed by an elemental lord. Select an element from the Elemental Instincts table to be your instinct's element. If your element offers multiple damage types, choose one of those type when you select your element.

ElementTraitDamage
AirAirElectricity or slashing
EarthEarthBludgeoning or piercing
FireFireFire
MetalMetalPiercing or slashing
WaterWaterBludgeoning or cold
WoodWoodBludgeoning or piercing

Instinct Ability—Elemental Rage While raging, you increase the additional damage from Rage from 2 to 3 and change its damage type to the one you selected for your element. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.CbfszeYw3cf99kdv]{Kineticist Dedication} multiclass feat as a bonus feat, even though you don't meet its level prerequisite. If you have any kineticist impulses with the same element type as the one you chose for your instinct, such as ones gained by taking the Kineticist Dedication multiclass feat, they gain the rage trait and the Sustain action gains the rage trait when it is used to Sustain these impulses.

Special You can select the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.6tDIVv2gafdO6GV4]{Through the Gate} kineticist archetype feat as a 2nd-level archetype feat.

Specialization Ability When you use elemental rage, you increase the damage from Rage from 3 to 7. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the damage from Rage when using elemental rage from 7 to 13.

Raging Resistance You resist the damage dealt by attacks and abilities of elemental creatures of your chosen element, as well as creatures made of your element, regardless of the damage type. You also resist damage dealt by attacks, spells, and abilities with your elemental trait.

Parley with Titans.name: 与泰坦谈判 Parley with Titans
Parley with Titans.description:
你的气场与举止会让最可怕的野兽想起它们的同类，从而开启与你们之间的对话。你可以用威吓代替交涉，对体型为大型或更大的生物进行[[/act request statistic=intimidation]]{请求}或[[/act make-an-impression statistic=intimidation]]{留下印象}。若该生物的类型与你的本能相关（例如野兽、巨龙或巨人），你在此次检定中获得+2环境加值。

特殊 若你拥有狂怒本能，则无论生物类型如何，你在此次检定中都获得+1环境加值。

Your presence and mannerisms remind the most terrible of beasts of their kin, opening up a dialogue with them. You may use Intimidation rather than Diplomacy to [[/act request statistic=intimidation]]{Request} or [[/act make-an-impression statistic=intimidation]]{Make an Impression} with creatures that are size Large or larger. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to this check if the creature is of a type related to your Instinct, such as a beast, a dragon or a giant.

Special If you have the fury instinct, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your check regardless of the creature type.

Revitalizing Roar.name: 复苏咆哮 Revitalizing Roar
Revitalizing Roar.description:
触发 你的回合开始。

需求 你低于你总生命值的一半。

伴随着可怕的嚎叫，你在战斗中宣泄出你的痛苦、挫败与怒火，使你获得继续战斗的力量。你恢复你角色等级四倍的生命值加上你的体质调整值（@Damage[(@actor.level * 4 + @actor.system.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]）。在你使用此动作后，你的狂暴立即结束，并且你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} 状态，直到你至少休息10分钟。

Trigger Your turn begins.

Requirements You are below half your total Hit Points.

With a terrible howl, you vent out your pain, frustration and anger in the middle of a fight to give you the strength to keep fighting. You restore four times your character level in Hit Points plus your Constitution modifier (@Damage[(@actor.level * 4 + @actor.system.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]). After you use this action, your Rage immediately ends and you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} until you rest for at least 10 minutes.

Breach Instinct.name: 破障本能 Breach Instinct
Breach Instinct.description:
你屹立于此界与彼界的帷幕之上。通过在传送位面的边界线上危险地穿行，你自身已成为连接诸界的裂隙。你竭力遏制自身力量与裂隙混沌的挣扎，在你的狂怒中显露无遗；仅凭一次挥击，你便能在存在本身上撕开裂口。

本能能力—破界重击 你的攻击召来来自你裂隙位面的幻象，在其后留下久久不散的虚影与阻碍。从下列传送位面中选择一个。一旦做出此选择便无法更改。对于你所创造的困难地形中的生物，你的狂暴提供的伤害加值从2提升至4。你获得破界重击行动。

位面

特征

星界

火焰，奥术

以太界

神圣，灵魂

冥界

黑暗，秘法

第一世界

光明，原初

专精能力（7级） 对于你所创造的困难地形中的生物，你的狂暴提供的伤害加值从4提升至8，且你的破界重击的锥形范围最多可以为15尺锥形。若你拥有高等武器专精，则改为将狂暴提供的伤害加值提升至16（仍仅针对你所创造的困难地形中的生物），且你的破界重击的锥形范围最多可以为20尺锥形。

狂暴抗力（9级） 你获得对精神伤害以及带有你所选位面特征的效果所造成的伤害的抗力。

You stand on the veil of this world and that of another. By precariously riding the lines of the transitive planes you have become a breach between worlds yourself. Your struggle to contain your powers and the chaos of a breach is apparent in your fury, as with a single swing you can cause rifts in existence.

Instinct Ability—Breaching Blows Your attacks conjure images from your breach plane, leaving lingering figments and obstructions in their wake. Choose one of the transitive planes below. Once this choice is made it cannot be changed. Increase your damage from Rage from 2 to 4 against creatures in difficult terrain you created. You gain the Breach Blow activity.

Plane

Traits

Astral

fire, arcane

Ethereal

divine, spirit

Netherworld

darkness, occult

First World

light, primal

Specialization Ability (7th) Increase the damage from Rage from 4 to 8 against creatures in difficult terrain you created and the cone from your Breach Blow can be up to a 15-foot cone. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the damage from Rage to 16 against creatures in difficult terrain you created and the cone of your Breach Blow can be up to a 20-foot cone.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist mental damage and damage from effects with your chosen plane’s traits.

Unleash Inner Beast.name: 释放内在野兽 Unleash Inner Beast
Unleash Inner Beast.description:
当你狂暴时，你可以射出体内野兽的显现来撕碎你的对手。你获得一种内在野兽的远程徒手攻击，造成1d4力场伤害，射程增量为20尺。此徒手攻击具有力场、魔法、推进和徒手特征。

While you rage, you can shoot manifestations of the beast inside you to savage your opponents. You gain an inner beast ranged unarmed attack that deals 1d4 force damage with a range increment of 20 feet. This unarmed attack has the force, magical, propulsive, and unarmed traits.

Giant Instinct (Alternate).name: 巨人本能（变体） Giant Instinct (Alternate)
Giant Instinct (Alternate).description:
尽管一些野蛮人的狂暴源于对巨人的概念崇敬，但其中也有一些人真正浸淫于巨人族的文化之中。有些人与掠夺成性的霜巨人同住，而另一些人则可能靠猎杀笨重的丘陵巨人勉强糊口……还有一些人甚至直接出身于某个特定的巨人氏族。不论其来源如何，这些巨人野蛮人都会在战斗中呼唤特定种类的巨人来赋予自己力量。从下表中选择一种巨人类型，你将受训于巨人学识。

本能能力——泰坦武器 你在巨人文化的标志性武器上训练有素，能像那些世世代代使用这些武器训练的泰坦一样挥舞它们。你从上表中获得一把由巨人之力强化的特殊武器。你的武器可能巨大得离谱，浸透巨人的鲜血，或是在他们的圣所中与他们一同锻造。当你挥持所列武器时，你的武器的伤害骰尺寸提高一级；若该武器是徒手攻击或简易武器，则提高两级（例如，长矛从d8提高到d12），并且你从狂暴获得的额外伤害从2提高到3。若你的武器会使其伤害骰尺寸提高到超过d12，例如巨斧，则你从狂暴获得的额外伤害从2提高到4，并且当你处于狂暴时，你的武器获得毁坏特征。

* 你的喇叭枪获得后坐特征，并且在其第一射程增量内造成你的狂暴伤害。若你将提高你的触及（例如来自巨人体态），你也将以相同数值提高你的喇叭枪的射程增量。

** 你的复合长弓在其第一射程增量内造成你完整的力量伤害与一半的狂暴伤害。若你将提高你的触及（例如来自巨人体态），你也将以相同数值提高你的复合长弓的射程增量。

专精能力（7级） 将狂暴的额外伤害从3提高到7；若你的武器伤害骰会被提高到超过d12的武器，则从4提高到8。若你拥有高等武器专精，则将其从7提高到13；若你的武器会被提高到超过d12，则从8提高到16。

狂暴抗力（9级） 你获得对你巨人本能所列类型的伤害抗力，以及对你巨人本能武器的伤害类型的伤害抗力。

While some barbarians’ rage is inspired by the concept of giants, certain among them are truly steeped in the cultures of giantdom. Some live among marauding frost giants while others may eke out a living slaying lumbering hill giants… and some are even directly descended from a particular giant clan. No matter the source, these giant barbarians call upon specific sorts of giants to empower them during combat. Select a giant type from the table below and you become trained in Giant Lore.

Instinct Ability—Titanic Weapon You are well trained in the iconic weapons of your giants' culture, able to wield them as well as the titans who have spent generations training with them. You gain a special weapon empowered by the might of giants from the above table. Your weapon might be immensely over-sized, soaked in the blood of giants or crafted alongside them in their sanctuaries. While wielding the listed weapon, the damage of your weapon is increased by one die size or by two die sizes if the weapon is an unarmed attack or a simple weapon (for example, longspear from a d8 to d12), and your additional damage from Rage increases from 2 to 3. If your weapon would increase its die size above a d12, such as a greataxe, your additional damage from Rage increases from 2 to 4 and your weapon gains the razing trait while you’re raging.

* Your blunderbuss gains the kickback trait and deals your Rage damage while within its first range increment. If you would increase your reach (such as from Giant Stature), you also increase the range increment your blunderbuss by the same amount.

** Your composite longbow deals your full Strength damage and half your Rage damage while within its first range increment. If you would increase your reach (such as from Giant Stature), you also increase the range increment of your composite longbow by the same amount.

Specialization Ability (7th) Increase the additional damage from Rage from 3 to 7, or from 4 to 8 if your weapon die would be increased above a d12 weapon. If you have greater weapon specialization, increase it from 7 to 13, or from 8 to 16 if your weapon would be increased above a d12.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist the damage resistance against the type listed for your giant instinct as well as the damage type of your giant instinct weapon.

Blood Surge Devastation.name: 血涌毁灭 Blood Surge Devastation
Blood Surge Devastation.description:
触发 你以重击成功进行一次打击，且该打击本会因暴怒而造成额外伤害。

你将怒火引导至难以想象的高度，使巨大的能量鞭挞撕裂你周遭的一切。你施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.hiqoZc3SW8BAuTOO]{Blood Surge}。

Trigger You critically succeed at a Strike that would deal additional damage from rage.

Channeling your fury to untold heights, you cause huge lashes of power to rip through your surroundings. You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.hiqoZc3SW8BAuTOO]{Blood Surge}.

Embrace the Eldritch.name: 拥抱诡秘 Embrace the Eldritch
Embrace the Eldritch.description:
触发 你成为一个需要进行豁免的法术或魔法效果的目标。

需求 你未处于恐惧状态。

你知道魔法很危险，但以战士之心直面诡异之物便能令其失去力量，因为恐惧不过是在对抗非自然之物的战争中受欢迎的伙伴。你将触发的豁免检定结果的成功等级视为提高一步。就你的本能而言，这算作你自愿接受一个法术的效果，并且你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。

Trigger You are the target of a spell or magical effect that requires a save.

Requirements You’re not frightened.

You know that magic is dangerous, but to face the eldritch with the heart of a warrior is to make it powerless, for fear is but a welcome partner in the war against the unnartural. You treat your degree of success on the triggering save as one step better. This counts as willingly accepting the effects of a spell for the purposes of your instinct and you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Greater Harness Bloodline.name: 高等驾驭血脉 Greater Harness Bloodline
Greater Harness Bloodline.description:
你完成踏入鲜血的最后一步。你获得你血脉的更高血脉法术。

You complete your final step into the blood. You gain your bloodline’s greater bloodline spell.

Become Ancestor.name: 成为先祖 Become Ancestor
Become Ancestor.description:
当你挥持你的遗珍武器时，你与祖先合而为一，你的性格发生变化，你的外表也变为祖先的模样。你在首次获得此专长时选择两个属性调整值，其中一个必须为力量、敏捷或体质，另一个必须为魅力、智力或感知。当你处于狂暴时，你将所选的属性调整值提高1，或将其提高至+4，以能使其数值更高者为准。当你处于狂暴时，你的遗珍武器获得巅峰（特征），且当你正从你的遗珍武器中受益时，你无法从任何其他巅峰物品中受益。

When you wield your vestige weapon, you and your ancestor merge into one being, your personality changing and your appearance becoming that of the ancestor. Choose two attribute modifiers when you first gain this feat, one must be Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution, and the other must be Charisma, Intelligence, or Wisdom. While raging, you either increase the chosen attribute modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value. Your vestige weapon gains the apex trait while you are raging and you cannot benefit from any other apex items while you are benefiting from your vestige weapon.

Hurling Might.name: 投掷之力 Hurling Might
Hurling Might.description:
在怒火中，你可以用尽全力将武器掷向触及之外的敌人。当你狂暴时，你持用的所有近战武器获得投掷 10 尺特征；若该武器已具有投掷特征，则其投掷射程增加 10 尺。你在投掷临时武器时，其攻击掷骰不承受减值。

In a fit of anger, you can throw weapons as hard as you can at enemies out of your reach. All melee weapons you wield gain the thrown 10 feet trait while you are raging or increase their thrown range by 10 feet if the weapon already had the thrown trait. You do not take a penalty to attack rolls for using improvised weapons when they are thrown.

Rage Tattoos.name: 狂暴纹身 Rage Tattoos
Rage Tattoos.description:
你可以制作纹身，包括魔法纹身。你获得用于纹身学识的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 通用专长，并且可以使用纹身学识而非制作来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft} 纹身。当你选择此专长时，你获得四个2级或更低的常见魔法纹身的配方。你在为自己制作纹身时，纹身学识检定获得+1环境加值。若你在纹身学识上为大师，则该加值提高至+2，并且你获得四个7级或更低的常见魔法纹身的配方。

You can craft tattoos, including magical tattoos. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Tattoo Lore and can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft} tattoos using Tattoo Lore instead of Crafting. When you select this feat, you gain the formulas for four common magical tattoos of 2nd level or lower. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Tattoo Lore checks to Craft tattoos on yourself. If you're a master in Tattoo Lore, this bonus increases to +2 and you gain the formulas for four common magical tattoos of 7th level or lower.

Vestige Instinct.name: 遗蜕本能 Vestige Instinct
Vestige Instinct.description:
你出身于某位传奇英雄的后裔，例如首位皇帝塔尔达里斯、弘古的可汗布杜甘，或萨埃布约恩·臂牙。当你投身战斗时，你能感觉到他们传奇的残痕在你体内燃烧。

本能能力——传承之怒 在战斗中，你引导自身传承的怒火。你的祖先通过一把武器与你相系，你起始时免费获得这把武器。当你狂暴时，你的武器会赋能于你，你会呈现出祖先肉体形态的性相，并且你的狂暴获得变形与异能（特征）。若你的遗器武器是一把简易武器，将该武器的伤害骰体型提高一级。你的遗器武器还获得“致命 d6”或“破毁”特征之一。若该武器已具有其中之一特征，你必须选择另一个特征。持用你的遗器武器时，你从狂暴获得的额外伤害由2提高至3。

专精能力（7级） 将从狂暴获得的额外伤害由3提高至7。若你拥有高等武器专精，改为将从狂暴获得的额外伤害提高至13。

狂暴抗力（9级） 你抵抗精神伤害与灵魂伤害。

You are descended from a legendary hero like First Emperor Taldaris, Khan Budugan of Hongal, or Saebjorn Arm-Fang. When you dive into battle, you can feel the remnants of their legend burning inside you.

Instinct Ability—Inherited Rage In battle, you channel the wrath of your legacy. Your ancestor is bonded to you through a weapon, and you start with this weapon for free. When you rage, your weapon empowers you and you take on aspects of your ancestors' physical form and your rage gains the polymorph and occult traits. If your vestige weapon is a simple weapon, increase the damage die size of that weapon by one step. Your vestige weapon also gains either the deadly d6 or razing trait. If the weapon has one of these traits, you must select the other trait. While wielding your vestige weapon, you increase the additional damage from Rage from 2 to 3.

Specialization Ability (7th) Increase the additional damage from Rage from 3 to 7. If you have greater weapon specialization, instead increase the additional damage from Rage to 13.

Raging Resistance (9th) You resist mental damage and spirit damage.

Forestbutcher.name: 森林屠夫 Forestbutcher
Forestbutcher.description:
由一群反主流的精灵设计，他们崇拜黑斧的持有者毁木者的美学（因此被大多数精灵认为极其令人作呕），森林屠夫斧既能劈树也能劈人。它们的斧刃经过配重，并以能切入木材的纹理沟槽并轻易将其分离的方式设计。森林屠夫对具有植物或木（特征）的生物，每个武器伤害骰额外造成1点精准伤害。

Designed by countercultural elves who admired the aesthetic of Treerazer, wielder of the Blackaxe (and thus found incredibly distasteful by most elves), forestbutcher axes cleave trees and men alike. Their blades are weighted and designed in such a way to cut into the grooves of wood and easily separate them. Forestbutchers deal 1 additional precision damage per weapon damage die to creatures with the plant or wood traits.

Spellbreaking Charge.name: 破法冲锋 Spellbreaking Charge
Spellbreaking Charge.description:
你以足以粉碎魔法本身的强力冲锋在战场上横冲直撞。先疾行，然后选择其一：尝试对一道屏障使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{强行开启}，或对一个生物使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}，随后尝试反制一个影响目标的魔法效果；进行该反制检定时，以你的法术DC - 10 作为该检定的反制调整值，并以你能施放的最高环法术作为反制环阶。若目标是一个屏障法术且你反制成功，该法术立即结束。无论你是否成功反制该效果，目标仍会承受你动作的正常效果。

You rampage through the field with a charge so powerful it can shatter magic itself. Stride and then either attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open} a barrier or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} a creature and then attempt to counteract a magical effect affecting the target, using your spell DC - 10 as the counteract modifier for the check and the highest rank spell you can cast as the counter rank. If the target was a barrier spell and you succeed at your counteract, the spell immediately ends. Targets still take the normal effects of your action regardless of whether or not you succeed in counteracting the effect.

Bark Barricade.name: 树皮路障 Bark Barricade
Bark Barricade.description:
你的前臂已经发育成粗壮的原木，让你能挡下甚至最强大的攻击。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.eZNCckLzbH3GyncH]{Shield Block} 专长。每 10 分钟一次，你可以花费一个带有操作（特征）的单动作，在你的一只手中创造一面持续 1 分钟的木制盾牌，并且你可以在用于创造它的动作中包含 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{Raise a Shield}。如果你停止持握该盾牌，它会立刻被摧毁，枯萎成死去的枝条。你创造的木制盾牌为 1 负载，具有 +2 的 AC 加值，硬度等于你的等级 + 3，生命值等于你等级的两倍，且其破损阈值等于你的等级。

Your forearms have developed into thick logs, allowing you to fend off even the greatest attack. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.classfeatures.eZNCckLzbH3GyncH]{Shield Block} feat. Once per 10 minutes, you can spend a single action with the manipulate trait to create a wooden shield in one of your hands that lasts for 1 minute and you can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{Raise a Shield} as part of your action to create it. The shield is destroyed immediately if you stop holding it, withering into dead branches. Wooden shields you create are 1 Bulk and have an AC bonus of +2, a Hardness equal to your level + 3, and Hit Points equal to twice your level with a Broken Threshold equal to your level.

Gigauntlets.name: 巨型护臂 Gigauntlets
Gigauntlets.description:
这些巨大的护手用来作为大多数重型护甲上普通护手的笨重替代品。即使它们具有徒手特征，当你装备巨型护手时也不能挥用武器，并且你不能执行那些需要你使用一套工具包来完成的动作（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.s1vB3HdXjMigYAnY]{医者工具包}）。

These enormous gauntlets serve as bulky replacements to the normal gauntlets from most heavy armors. You cannot wield weapons when armed with gigauntlets even though they have the free-hand trait and you cannot perform actions that would require you to use a set of tools to perform (such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.s1vB3HdXjMigYAnY]{healer’s toolkit}).

Essence Sap.name: 精华汲取 Essence Sap
Essence Sap.description:
当他人的机能被耗竭时，你的异怪显现便会大快朵颐。选择一个与你相邻且具有以下状态之一的生物：笨拙、目眩、失聪、衰弱、着迷、恐惧、麻痹、震慑或迟钝。该生物受到等同于你狂暴额外伤害的伤害，而你恢复等同于造成伤害数值的生命值（@Check[type:will|basic:true|against:classDC] 以你的职业DC进行意志豁免）。

As the faculties of others are depleted, your aberrative manifestations feast. Choose a creature adjacent to you with one of the following conditions: clumsy, dazzled, deafened, enfeebled, fascinated, frightened, paralyzed, stunned, or stupefied. The creature takes damage equal to your additional damage from rage and you regain a number of hit points equal to the damage dealt (@Check[type:will|basic:true|against:classDC] save against your class DC).

Instinct Crown (Untamed).name: 本能冠冕（狂野） Instinct Crown (Untamed)
Instinct Crown (Untamed).description:
本能王冠是一种魔法头饰，灌注了野蛮人在战斗中汲取的本能精华。每顶王冠都会被制作成与其所关联的本能相符的样式，例如动物本能王冠会做成狼首造型，而巨人本能王冠则可能是一顶刻有约顿符文的朴素头盔。佩戴时，王冠让你能更进一步挖掘自身本能；若王冠的精华与你的本能相匹配，你将获得更强大的增益。你必须能够进入狂暴才能使用王冠的启动。

启动 F 想象

频率 每日一次

触发 你掷骰先攻

效果 你进入狂暴，获得额外10点临时生命值。

启动 2 命令、想象

需求 王冠的本能与你的野蛮人本能相匹配

频率 每日一次

效果 你与你的伙伴已学会齐心协力撕裂敌人的血肉。你的动物伙伴使用狂暴，并在其狂暴结束前获得加速状态。它可以用其额外动作来进行支援或打击。若你与你的动物伙伴在你的回合中成功对同一目标进行打击，你的动物伙伴可以花费一个单动作，以你的动物伙伴用于该次打击的徒手攻击的伤害来对目标进行撕裂。

An instinct crown is a magical headpiece imbued with the essence of instincts that barbarians draw upon in combat. Each crown is fashioned to represent the instinct it's tied to, such as a wolf's head for an animal instinct crown or a simple helmet with Jotun runes for a giant instinct crown. When worn, the crown allows you to tap further into your instincts, granting you even greater benefits if the crown's essence matches your instinct. You must be able to Rage to use the crown's activations.

Activate F envision

Frequency once per day

Trigger You roll initiative

Effect You Rage, gaining 10 additional temporary Hit Points.

Activate 2 command, envision

Requirements The crown's instinct matches your barbarian instinct

Frequency once per day

Effect You and your companion have learned to tear the flesh of your enemies in unison. Your animal companion uses Rage and becomes quickened until the end of its rage. It can use its extra action to Support or Strike. If you and your animal companion successfully Strike the same target during your turn, your animal companion can spend a single action to Rend the target using the damage of the unarmed attack that your animal companion used for the Strike.

Rune Swap.name: 符文置换 Rune Swap
Rune Swap.description:
你可以通过魔法专注将你的符文变形为其他符文。你可以花费10分钟，将你为符文印记所选择的一枚符文更改为你选择的另一枚符文，用新选定的符文取代原符文的效果。此更改将永久持续，直到你选择再次更改你的符文。

Your runes can be morphed into other runes through magical concentration. You can spend 10 minutes to change one of the runes you selected for Runic Marks to another rune of your choice, replacing the effects of the rune with the newly selected rune. This change is permanent until you choose to change your runes again.

Chaos of the Wildblooded.name: 狂野血脉之混沌 Chaos of the Wildblooded
Chaos of the Wildblooded.description:
即使在你最冷静的时刻，你也从未离通过你的魔法引导大规模毁灭这一瞬间超过一步之遥。每当你因法术而受到伤害时，你会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} 状态，直到你下个回合结束。你可以使用你的额外动作来进行打击（Strike），或施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.hiqoZc3SW8BAuTOO]{Blood Surge}。

Even in your calmest moments, you are never more than an instant away from channeling mass destruction through your magic. Whenever you take damage from a spell, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} until the end of your next turn. You can use your extra action to Strike or to cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.items.hiqoZc3SW8BAuTOO]{Blood Surge}.

Volatile Rage.name: 易爆狂怒 Volatile Rage
Volatile Rage.description:
你饮用的化学品并不适合食用，然而当你狂暴时，它们依然会赋予你力量。你学会6种炼金炸弹的配方。当你把多功能小瓶存放在你的器具中时，你可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.i0Urwze7pbBPVx3X]{疯狂科学} 制作一枚炸弹，然后消耗它来代替突变药剂。以这种方式消耗一枚炸弹视为为突变狂暴而消耗一剂突变药剂。当你消耗一枚炸弹时，你从狂暴获得的额外伤害会将其伤害类型改为与你的炸弹相同，而不是你武器或徒手攻击的伤害类型。

The chemicals you imbibe are not safe for consumption, and yet when you rage, they empower you nonetheless. You learn the formula for 6 alchemical bombs. When you store versatile vials in your apparatus, you can use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-team-plus-barbarians.misc.i0Urwze7pbBPVx3X]{Mad Science} to create a bomb and then consume it instead of a mutagen. Consuming a bomb in this way counts as consuming a mutagen for mutagenic rage. When you consume a bomb, your additional damage from Rage changes its damage type to match that of your bomb instead of the damage type for your weapon or unarmed attack.

Axewheel.name: 斧轮 Axewheel
Axewheel.description:
这个装有斧刃的圆形框架可作为一种致命的武器，既可用于近距离战斗，也可对射程内的敌人进行致命的投掷攻击。

This circular frame with mounted axe blades serves as a means for a deadly weapon in both close range combat, and against enemies within range of a deadly throw.

Extraneous Limbs.name: 多余肢体 Extraneous Limbs
Extraneous Limbs.description:
你在狂暴时会获得额外的肢体供你使用。你获得2个额外附肢，使你能够持有最多相当于四只手所能持有的武器和装备。你必须指定一对附肢作为你的活跃之手，并且你在使用此能力时选择哪一对为活跃。你只能用你的活跃之手挥用物品，但你可以用你的其他肢体执行简单的互动动作。你可以再次采取此动作，将该指定从一对手改为另一对手。

You gain additional limbs that you can use when you are raging. You gain 2 additional appendages, which allow you to hold up to four hands’ worth of weapons and equipment. You must designate a pair of appendages as your active hands and you choose which pair is active when you use this ability. You can only wield items in your active hands, but you can take simple Interact actions with your other limbs. You can change this designation from one pair of hands to another by taking this action again.

Know the Breach.name: 了解裂隙 Know the Breach
Know the Breach.description:
你通过与位面的持续连接学会了理解位面。你获得以你所选择的位面为主题的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{追加学识}通用专长，并且当你处于狂暴时，使用该学识进行的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}检定获得狂暴（特征）。你对抗由源自你所选择位面的生物所产生的效果的豁免获得+1状态加值。

You have learned to understand the planes through your constant connection to them. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for your chosen plane and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks for this Lore gain the rage trait while you are raging. You gain a +1 status bonus to saves against effects produced by creatures that originate from your chosen plane.

Mountain Hammer.name: 山岳重锤 Mountain Hammer
Mountain Hammer.description:
这把战锤的锤头是一块如同矮人般巨大的石板，由铁箍紧紧束缚在一起。其惊人的重量意味着它常被拖行携带，随后以可怖的弧线直接砸向敌人的头颅。

This hammer’s head is a slab of stone as large as a dwarf, held together by iron bands. Its sheer weight means it is often dragged around, then brought in a terrible arc directly into an enemy’s skull.
